100.text: As a peculiar scent percolates, an odd sensation fills your mind—the sentient is talking to you through their odor! “Greetings,” they say, “and welcome to the forest. Please take care to not step on any flora. Would you like a guide through these lands?” Gain sentient [b]Item 1351[/b].

101.text: As you watch, there is a blur of movement. One second, the animal is chewing on a leaf; the next, it’s holding one of your possessions. It drops it off the rock as if to say, “Take it back so I can have another go.” Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

102.text: It’s brand new, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

103.text: You sit down and let the animals come to you. You sense a level of intelligence in their eyes as they examine your clothing and chirp to each other. Having deemed you more friend than foe, they climb into your arms and signal for you to carry them across the stream. Through unknown means they open a door hidden in the boulder and hop into the darkness. Go to cave [b]Location 095[/b].

104.text: As you reach for the cloak, the animal vanishes into thin air. You have a few seconds to study the details of your current location before there’s a flurry of movement in the grove, then the trap door slams shut. Go to [b]Location 511[/b] and continue.

105.text: You can’t be sure without testing it, but this beastly bird might be big enough to carry you short distances in the sky. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

106.text: The runes etched into the ancient stone speak to you as you begin to comprehend them. You’re looking at a portal to other parts of the world. Stepping through it would teleport you to a distant island. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

107.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

108.text: You perceptively notice that the mushrooms are planted intentionally close to the shield. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

109.text: The sentient seems to understand the hummingbird-like animal, which rapidly darts in all directions. The sentient seems the happiest when the bird flies right past your ear from the south to deliver some news. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]2 help[-]; you may continue.

110.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the leaf animals, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]CREATE[/b][-] action.

111.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glasslike substance, so it must have taken immense strength to break it. You notice trampled shrubbery leading to the east. Gain item [b]Item 1194[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

1110.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the elder dragon (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1110.text: You open your mind to the thoughts of the elder dragon, who speaks to you telepathically. “You are safe with me, my dear alien. I will protect you just as well among the clouds as under the ocean, and even into the great beyond, from which my ancestors came to this world when the origins of life were just beginning to bloom.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1602[/b] (place it in the center).

112.text: The creature eyes you as it slurps the freshwater, and it wags its “tail” eagerly. It’s excited to meet you! Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

113.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

115.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the building through a window
115.text: Through the stained glass you see a room filled with maps, books, and crystals. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

116.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about your mission
116.text: “If you’re trying to map the world, this is a great place to advance that goal.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

117.text: You perceptively notice the runes painted on the rocks surrounding the Darkstone. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. You may continue with the [fff349]take-[b]EXTRACT[/b][-] action.

118.text: The animal saw you well before you saw it, and your unassuming stance motivates it to slow down and drift over to you. It smells your hand and licks it affectionately. Gain animal [b]Item 804[/b].

119.text: The sentient, who introduces themselves as a philanthropist, starts by talking about the nearby runes and flowers, then the wishing well to the south, then the Darkstone to the west… you barely have time to introduce yourself. Gain sentient [b]Item 1353[/b].

012.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] as far into the interior as you dare venture
012.text: You’re able to reach a pile of coins near the back of the shipwreck (gain $10). Calmly exit to [b]Location 649[/b].

120.text: “It’s bittersweet that both life and death stem from such devastation. Fire sentients are born of volcanoes like this one— you are entering their realm. Those whom I’ve met are fierce and protective, and if you prove that you can endure just like the fire or the sea, they will respect you.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

121.text: The owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost, and gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

122.text: You’re surrounded by artifacts and technology. To the north you see a fragment of your ship, and to the east lies an array of futuristic technology. To the south is a large, dark stone that tugs at something deep within you. Gain 3 boost.

123.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—this neutral area of the world was set aside to invite civilizations beyond this world to visit. Gain 1 boost.

124.text: The only entrance you find is the towering, illuminated front door. Then several metal sentients glide through the energy shield with ease. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; go to interior [b]Location 554[/b].

125.text: As you face the molten labyrinth, you have a choice. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay 4 boost to navigate through the lava tunnels to reach the artifact
choices.outcome: Ignoring the elaborate puzzle, you simply use your navigation skills to reach the artifact. Gain item [b]Item 998[/b] and perform no other location actions here.

Find card [b]Location 532[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. You can only bear the heat long enough to venture down one path. The goal is to choose which of the 3 tunnels to enter so that you can follow a continuous path to the artifact in the back left. The first row represents the three tunnel entrances—it is static and correct. After the first row, each square is in the correct row and the correct orientation (i.e., no rotating), though not necessarily in the correct column. Visually rearrange the squares in each row to ultimately declare the tunnel you wish to enter. See entry [b]Location 125[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

126.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little corroded by the sulfuric fumes), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

1265.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1265.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

127.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about this passage
127.text: “This passage is unique because it starts (in the east) with a priceless sword and ends (to the north) with another priceless sword. If you’re trying to collect such artifacts, you’re in the right place.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

1270.text: Gain the “create” ability ([b]Item 1465[/b]) or the “navigate” ability ([b]Item 1464[/b]).

1272.action: [a84fc0]STUDY[-] viticulture and the art of winemaking

1274.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] between two sentients (you may pay 1 boost from this structure to reduce this cost to 1)
1274.text: In an effort to establish diplomatic relations, you bridge the language gap between two sentients, one of whom communicates through a digital interface and the other with a verbal language that sounds like boiling soup. Both walk away pleased with the outcome. Gain either circuit sentient [b]Item 1314[/b] or gold sentient [b]Item 1324[/b].

1275.action: [a84fc0]WISH[-] for wisdom (pay 1 boost from this structure; perform this action at most once per game)
1275.text: Gain spell [b]Item 1376[/b] and 1 boost on this structure.

1276.action: [a84fc0]SCOUT[-] the area for fans of theater
1276.text: On a nearby path you find a sentient who loves the performing arts. Gain sentient [b]Item 1360[/b].

1277.action: [a84fc0]STUDY[-] the art of creating specialty cocktails

128.text: The sentient, a famous knight, chooses the nearby plain of igneous rock as the dueling grounds for this combat puzzle. Find card [b]Location 533[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. Your goal is to force the knight into a pit. As the knight warms up, you notice that they always move in the opposite direction of their opponent (e.g., if their opponent moves east, the knight moves west). When you’re ready, place a red token representing you and a green token representing the knight on the starting spaces on card [b]Location 533[/b]. Start by moving your token 1 square (not into rocks, pits, or off the grounds), then move their token 1 square in the opposite direction (they don’t move if they would move into a rock or off the grounds). Repeat this until you force the knight into a pit or share the same square with the knight. Then read entry [b]Location 128[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

1280.action: [a84fc0]LEARN[-] useful information to teach at the school
1280.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain ability [b]Item 1475[/b]. If 2 boost, gain ability [b]Item 1484[/b]. If 3 boost, gain ability [b]Item 1497[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

1281.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to news from around the world

1283.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1283.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1286.action: [a84fc0]SCAN[-] for targets in the surrounding area

1287.text: You learn more information about the cave that you can use for guided tours. Gain 1 boost on this structure.

1288.text: One of the perks of owning a garden is having a vast array of flowers to enjoy at any time. Gain 1 morale. If you have 3 boost on this structure, also gain ability [b]Item 1466[/b], which you learn from dodging through the dangerous flora.

1289.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1289.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

129.text: It’s almost as if someone placed a giant puzzle box in the middle of the ocean—you’re confident that there’s something inside to loot. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

1290.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1290.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1291.text: One of the perks of owning a garden is having a vast array of flowers to enjoy at any time. Gain 1 morale. If you have 3 boost on this structure, also gain ability [b]Item 1477[/b], which you learn from your careful observations of each plant’s unique needs.

1292.text: Gain 1 boost on your character, then find the region where this structure is located (see [a84fc0]look[-] storybook entry for the structure’s location) and use page 2 of the Book of Vantages to determine the page where your view is portrayed (look at that page).

1293.text: If there is 1 boost on this structure, gain ability [b]Item 1498[/b]. If 2 boost, gain ability [b]Item 1514[/b]. If 3 boost, gain ability [b]Item 1502[/b]. All boost remain on this structure.

013.text: The glowing lamp at the rear of the interior indicates that this hostel may not be as abandoned as it first appeared. You find a mysterious tunnel leading west into the darkness. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-] and continue.

130.text: While both sentients are having fun, the sentient on the left seems to be winning disproportionately often. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

1305.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to move like the wind, which they have been preparing to do for the Trial of Life. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-].

1306.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to talk to flowers. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1307.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to navigate using wind patterns. Gain ability [b]Item 1464[/b].

1308.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to offer your support to others. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-].

1309.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to evade those who stand in your way. Gain ability [b]Item 1485[/b].

131.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] through an open seam in the tent
131.text: You’re confident that there’s something inside to loot, and sure enough, you see a circuit board. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; go to interior [b]Location 550[/b].

1310.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to repair damaged equipment. Gain ability [b]Item 1475[/b].

1311.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to fight like a warrior. Gain ability [b]Item 1504[/b].

1312.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to solve difficult problems. Gain [a84fc0]2 look[-].

1313.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to communicate more effectively. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1314.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hack into technology. Gain ability [b]Item 1472[/b].

1315.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to craft basic items into better items. Gain ability [b]Item 1462[/b].

1316.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to make structures. Gain either the “assemble” ability ([b]Item 1506[/b]) or the “build” ability ([b]Item 1488[/b]).

1317.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to give flattering compliments. Gain ability [b]Item 1480[/b].

1318.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to scavenge for things people have lost, or even where to sell such things. Either gain ability [b]Item 1510[/b] or go to cave [b]Location 094[/b].

1319.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to explore dark areas. Gain [a84fc0]1 look[-].

132.text: As you inspect the sword closely, you notice an inscription on the blade. “The Katana of Life. Thou shall cut but not kill; thou shall cleave but not maim.” Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

1320.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to buy and sell effectively. Gain ability [b]Item 1479[/b].

1321.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to play card and dice games. Gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b].

1322.text: The sentient patiently teaches you either how to be more persuasive (gain ability [b]Item 1463[/b]) or how to play their favorite dice and card and dice game (gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b]).

1323.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to scan an area for important details. Gain ability [b]Item 1497[/b].

1324.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to attack without leaving yourself vulnerable. Gain ability [b]Item 1474[/b].

1325.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hail boats in your direction. Gain [fd8c46]3 engage[-].

1326.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to translate foreign languages. Gain [a84fc0]3 look[-].

1327.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to transfer energy from one creature to another. Gain [fff349]3 take[-].

1328.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to coax animals toward you without getting bitten. Gain ability [b]Item 1500[/b].

choices.option: Learn how to study mysterious objects like towers and lorestones
choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1492[/b].

choices.option: Learn about the beginning of life on this planet
choices.outcome: The sentient is happy to explain that the world was a blank slate until the Great Collision, which seeded the planet with the origins of life. Gain 1 boost.

133.text: You feel a surge of inspiration as green energy seeps from the spire into your hands. The power to heal advanced technology is contained within these ancient stones, and now it is part of you. Gain spell [b]Item 1371[/b].

1330.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to defend against attacks. Gain ability [b]Item 1478[/b].

1331.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to mimic the sounds of animals. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1332.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to compel someone by authority. Gain [fff349]2 take[-].

1333.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hunt animals with respect and honor. Gain ability [b]Item 1473[/b].

1334.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to subdue an attacker. Gain [ec1c3b]2 overpower[-].

1335.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to observe the world around you better. Gain ability [b]Item 1477[/b].

1336.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to loot unattended items without being caught. Gain ability [b]Item 1511[/b].

1337.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to inspect runecasters and other devices. Gain [a84fc0]3 look[-].

1338.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to pick locks on treasure chests. Gain ability [b]Item 1471[/b].

1339.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to dismantle technology. Gain [fff349]3 take[-].

134.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

1340.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to steer vehicles through various terrain. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-].

1341.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to create products as a business. Gain ability [b]Item 1465[/b].

1342.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to guide others without being patronizing. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-].

1343.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to learn new skills faster. They explain that their composition dramatically enhances their ability to internalize new information: Every granule in a sand sentient is inherited from sand sentients before them, dating back to the origins of life on this planet. Gain [a84fc0]2 look[-].

1344.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to activate technology. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1345.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to transmit signals to far-away recipients. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1346.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to squeeze through tight places. Gain ability [b]Item 1507[/b].

1347.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to boast bigger. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1348.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to commune with nature. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-].

1349.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to assemble solutions to overcome barriers in your journey. Gain ability [b]Item 1506[/b].

135.text: You identify a bedroll among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; go to interior [b]Location 541[/b].

1350.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to heal the sick. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1351.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to nurture the flora around you. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1352.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to brew flora into potions without poisoning yourself. Gain ability [b]Item 1476[/b].

1353.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to aid others who don’t realize they need assistance. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1354.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to honor ancient landmarks. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1355.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to practice new abilities. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-].

1356.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to craft objects into powerful items. Gain ability [b]Item 1462[/b].

1357.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to slay elementals. Gain [ec1c3b]2 overpower[-].

1358.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to raid buildings of precious items. Gain ability [b]Item 1467[/b].

1359.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to enlist others to join your cause. Gain [fff349]2 take[-].

136.text: View page 45 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

1360.text: The sentient patiently teaches you one of two abilities. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn to climb trees and cliffs
choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1468[/b].
Gain ability [b]Item 1503[/b].

1361.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to fish for food. Gain ability [b]Item 1461[/b].

1362.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to refine crystals and gems. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

1363.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to hike without getting blisters. Gain [2694d0]3 move[-].

1364.text: The sentient patiently teaches you how to upgrade vehicles. Gain [0b955e]3 help[-].

137.text: It looks like the beast died long ago from blunt force trauma. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

138.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

139.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the not-so-distant past—this confluence is a meeting place between leaf and water sentients. Gain 1 boost.

140.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about your mission
140.text: “If you’re trying to learn magic, the spires to the northwest and southeast of here might expand your mind.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

141.text: It looks like the beast died from some sort of projectile, perhaps a hunting weapon. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

142.text: The wreckage in front of you is from your ship, but the Traveler was clearly on this planet before you, so you listen curiously as they explain how your ship could be an older model than theirs. “I’m from the future—around 100 years from now, based on my current calculations. I crashed here after a chronological error caused by a terraforming experiment, so even though I’m from the future, I crashed here in the distant past. Frankly I’m amazed that my body has survived this long—it’s in my ship far to the east of here.” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

143.text: You shouldn’t have a problem squeezing into one of the escape pod ports. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

1435.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1435.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1454[/b], [a84fc0]1 look[-], and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

1436.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1436.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1455[/b], [2694d0]1 move[-], and [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

1437.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1437.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1456[/b], [a84fc0]1 look[-], and [0b955e]1 help[-].

1438.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1438.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1457[/b], [fd8c46]1 engage[-], and [fff349]1 take[-].

1439.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1439.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1458[/b], [0b955e]1 help[-], and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

144.text: The sentient is hesitant to share the secrets of the lotus with you, but they acknowledge your good intentions. Lotuses are a source of health and renewal, but they can be highly addictive when brewed and consumed. The sentient offers you a map showing where lotuses can be found, including one to the southwest of here. Gain item [b]Item 1257[/b] and 1 boost; the sentient highlights your current location on the map (view page 14 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region O).

1440.action: [a84fc0]MASTER[-] some survival skills (you may perform this action at most once per game)
1440.text: You master some skills that may help you to survive on this planet. Gain experience card [b]Item 1459[/b], [2694d0]1 move[-], and [fff349]1 take[-].

145.text: An injured bird perches on the stone, and a splash of energy envelops its body. It flies away in perfect health. Gain ability [b]Item 1483[/b], 2 boost, and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

146.text: The runes behind the sentient pulse with an energy similar to that of the sentient. There is both a sadness and a joy to the energy, and you can see that the sentient is carrying a cylindrical parchment. Gain 1 morale, and gain either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

147.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

148.text: The landscape is peaceful and quiet with not much of note other than the ship wreckage to the south. In the serenity of the moment, you almost miss a bird flying too close to the surface of the sea and getting swallowed whole by an underwater leviathan. Gain 2 boost and continue.

149.action: [a84fc0]INSPECT[-] the ethereal area at the base of the hill
149.text: As you stand within the green light, you feel a growing sense of connection with and control over the varied forms of life that surround you. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b].

150.text: Despite its fiery disposition, the animal actually just seems to want to help. As you watch, it darts behind you and blocks a volcanic fireball from striking this tiny island, saving you from a nasty burn. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

151.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

152.text: The odor has a hint of sea salt and sword blades. Gain 1 boost and continue.

153.text: You perceptively notice that the six large birds nearby are all poised to strike anyone who steps foot onto the island. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

154.text: The Traveler looks stoically to the north. “Beware of the fire elemental—they will try to trick you into releasing them. It’s a more powerful gesture to lay down your weapons to the east of it.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

155.text: “East of here you’ll find a true rarity in this world, a portal that sends you to a faraway location. Please be cautious about entering such portals, as it’s a one-way trip.” Gain ability [b]Item 1498[/b] and 1 boost.

156.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler as they communicate with the large insect
156.text: The Traveler gently coaxes the fiery insect, which perches on a nearby rock. As scary as it looks, it seems like it’s looking for a way to help. Gain ability [b]Item 1500[/b] and 1 boost.

157.text: You toss a pebble through the arch, and it doesn’t splash into the water on the other side. Gain 1 boost and continue.

1577.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1577.text: You’ve always had a flair for the dramatic, perhaps even a touch of a savior complex. Even though no one has asked for your help, this world is new to you, so it must be your job to save it, right? Elementals are massive beasts, often seen from a distance. Slaying an elemental isn’t easy, so be prepared when you take on this challenge. Gain the Map of Elementals ([b]Item 1262[/b]).

1578.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1578.text: You’ve formed a common bond with your crewmates over the question, “Why are we here?” There are a few different places with visual clues for the origins; if you see something historical, talk to the people there to learn more. To help find locations where you can answer this question, gain the Map of Interiors ([b]Item 1256[/b]).

1579.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1579.text: As a fledgling member of the Academy, you need a combination of experience and knowledge to pass your survival training test and reach your full potential. Choose a player to gain the results of their character’s [a84fc0]look-[b]MASTER[/b][-] action.

158.text: The sentient is distractedly drawing diagrams of a vehicle in the sand. As you watch them, you find yourself fixating on the rune on the rock. Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

1580.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1580.text: You’re collecting flowers for the royal greenhouse on your world. A variety of flora are scattered across the world, ready to be plucked! To help find locations where you can find flora, gain the Map of Flora ([b]Item 1263[/b]).

1581.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1581.text: The blight has ravaged your world, destroying millions of lives. You have hope for an antidote in this new world. Gain the apothecary ([b]Item 1268[/b]).

1582.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1582.text: First contact is an important moment for any world, and you have the opportunity to share the stars with these cultures. Each sentient has unique preferences for convincing them to join you (and keeping them with you), and you can draw them to you by activating runecasters. Gain the Book of Sentients ([b]Item 1044[/b]).

1583.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1583.text: You fancy yourselves enterprising adventurers, traveling the galaxy to find the rarest of treasures, animals, and vehicles. Gain the Map of Treasure ([b]Item 1260[/b]).

1584.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1584.text: On behalf of an interplanetary conservation fund, you’re here to collect and protect a variety of animal species. Most wild animals can be convinced to join you, especially if you treat them well. Training can take a little time. Gain the Book of Animals ([b]Item 1043[/b]).

1585.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1585.text: As members of the Galactic Cartographers Guild, your primary goal is to chart as much of the planet as possible, viewing the world from new perspectives. Look for towers to scale so you can see the surrounding area from above. Gain the Map of Towers ([b]Item 1259[/b]).

1586.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1586.text: As part of a year-long sabbatical from your job, you’re here to enhance the lives of complete strangers. Many sentients will share ways you can help if you offer your assistance to them, and some sentients post “help wanted” ads on the exterior of wayfinder orbs. Gain the Map of Orbs ([b]Item 1258[/b]).

1587.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1587.text: Born and raised in poverty, you’ve managed to scrape together the funds to strike it rich on an alien planet. Many of the things you accumulate (items, flora, animals, etc) have a monetary value; you can sell them at markets around the world. You could also pickpocket or dig your way into a pretty penny. Gain the Map of Cities ([b]Item 1251[/b]).

1588.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1588.text: After struggling through dead-end jobs and relationships, you signed up for a week-long self-care retreat. Find inspiration— and your first objective—in your character’s personal item. Gain that item (or gain any 2 skills if you already have your personal item):[2694d0]Captain[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1299[/b].[a84fc0]Navigator[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1300[/b].[fd8c46]Scholar[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1301[/b].[0b955e]Medic[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1302[/b].[fff349]Engineer[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1303[/b].[ec1c3b]Marine[-]: Gain item [b]Item 1304[/b].

1589.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1589.text: After securing the kraken on a different planet, you were transporting it back home to collect a massive bounty. Now it’s wreaking havoc on this world. Seek it wherever there is water and use fishing equipment to capture or kill it. Gain item [b]Item 913[/b].

159.text: The scalding lava would instantly wound you, but these creatures seem to be bathing in it. There is something ritualistic about their movements, as if they are simultaneously relaxing in and guiding the lava. One of the sentients sports an elaborate array of tattoos. Gain 2 boost and continue.

1590.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1590.text: After some ill-advised choices in the undercity on your home planet, you’re on the run. This uncharted planet can provide refuge, but only if you find the source of the signal that helped you find this world in the first place. Based on the decryption, it seems to come from a ship not entirely unlike your own, perhaps related to the mysterious Traveler. The closest your incoming ship was able to pinpoint the signal was somewhere in the middle of the southeastern region of the world (view page 5 of the Book of Vantages).

1591.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1591.text: Your planet is no longer able to sustain life, and you’re tasked with building a new colony from the ground up with permission from the sentients who were here first. You lucked into finding a planet that’s already well populated, so you could earn money to buy an existing home. Alternatively, you could find the right place to build a home of your own. Gain the Map of Interiors ([b]Item 1256[/b]).

1592.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1592.text: As elite members of the armed forces, you’re here to shoot first and ask questions later. This mission requires that you find a city location (a type of vertical location card that notes the name of the city/town/village on the card) and perform multiple [ec1c3b]overpower[-] actions there. Gain the Map of Cities ([b]Item 1251[/b]).The capital city is not eligible to be conquered, as it is too big.

1593.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1593.text: You are here on behalf of a cohort of ambassadors seeking alliances with new worlds. The best way to form strong bonds is to prove your worth to the cultures on this planet. Gain the Map of Trials ([b]Item 1261[/b]).

1594.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1594.text: You work for a mega-corporation, Calligraph Corp, and you’ve been tasked with locating and gathering precious minerals from various planets. Your ship’s sensors indicated that powerful crystals are abundant in this world, some in constant motion in the bodies of animals, others remaining in one place under skeletons. Gain the Map of Skeletons ([b]Item 1254[/b]).

1595.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1595.text: A dangerous dictator rules your homeworld with an iron fist, and you managed to escape the blockade there to seek allies, weapons, and skills. Any card with an [ec1c3b]overpower[-] slot—even a specific ability— counts toward this goal. Some of these items are found in treasure chests. Gain the Map of Treasure ([b]Item 1260[/b]).

1596.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1596.text: This planet appeared on your radar because of a signal received from the mysterious Traveler. Finding the source of the Traveler’s signal is key, and its encryption seems similar to that used by your ship’s own comm systems. The closest your incoming ship was able to pinpoint the signal was somewhere in the middle of the southeastern region of the world (view page 5 of the Book of Vantages).

1597.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the mission (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1597.text: You swore to your family that your heisting days will be behind you… if you complete one last job with the help of your old team. While there are plenty of things to steal on this planet, a heist isn’t petty theft: You can offer your help to sentients to gain and complete a heist quest, or you can earn a precious artifact by passing a test. Gain the Map of Artifacts ([b]Item 1264[/b]).

1598.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1598.text: When combined, the towers on this planet are advanced enough to transmit a powerful signal. Gain the Map of Towers ([b]Item 1259[/b]), and each player gains [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

1599.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1599.text: Communication is crucially important in trying to track down your crewmates. Climbing towers to get a view from above may also help. Your cats love trees, so you’re most likely to find them in the forest canopy. Each player gains 1 random skill.

160.text: A pair of burly sentients is guarding the entrance from the shadows. Inside the building, you can hear a constant clanking and the whistle of bellows—you’re pretty sure this is a forge. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

1600.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1600.text: There are quite a few houses scattered across the world, but they are occupied by sentients—you could save up enough money to buy one of them. Or you could seek opportunities to build your own structure and make it a liveable space. Gain $5, and each player gains [0b955e]1 help[-].

1601.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1601.text: In such a vast world, there are quite a few patches of land where you might build a business. But you could also seek out employment in cities, taking over an existing shop. Gain the Map of Cities ([b]Item 1251[/b]), and each player gains [0b955e]1 help[-].

1602.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1602.text: You hear rumors of a dragon living in a mountain just north of the windswept grasslands. You also learn that not all elder dragons are old—legend tells of a special egg that, when hatched, will bring a new elder dragon into this world. Gain the Map of Caves ([b]Item 1252[/b]), and each player gains 1 random skill.

1603.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1603.text: On this world, it seems that no greater glory can be achieved than in the card and dice game, Skirm. Seek out duels whenever you can, and try your luck in opening treasure chests to find more Skirm cards. Gain the Map of Treasure ([b]Item 1260[/b]), and each player gains [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

1604.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1604.text: Teleportation blurs the line between science and magic; in this world, using a spell to bridge great distances isn’t unheard of. Gain the Book of Spells for Spirit magic ([b]Item 1214[/b]), and each player gains [2694d0]1 move[-].

1605.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1605.text: Your spaceship shattered into several pieces across the planet during the crash. Be prepared for an extensive repair process. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-]; each other player gains [0b955e]1 help[-].

1606.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1606.text: The people of this world traverse the planet in a variety of ways, and almost any vehicle can be upgraded into something better. If you repeat this process enough times, you’ll find yourself in a motley but fully functional spaceship. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-]; each other player gains [0b955e]1 help[-].

1607.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1607.text: The spaceship that brought you to this planet was a modern marvel of technological wizardry. It would take dozens of years to rebuild it from scratch. Fortunately, there are some time anomalies on this planet that may reduce the time you need to have a ship built. You may need to hire someone to oversee the job. Gain $5, and each player gains [fd8c46]1 engage[-].

1608.action: [a84fc0]RESEARCH[-] how you can complete the destiny (this action can be performed at most once per game)
1608.text: Time travel may be a fictional concept where (and when) you come from, but some sentients of this planet shift through the sands of time on a daily basis. Learn from their wisdom to undo this terrible crash. Gain the Book of Spells for Mind magic ([b]Item 1215[/b]), and each player gains [a84fc0]1 look[-].

161.text: The sentient explains that you’re both standing on their mother, a fledgling volcano, and their duty is to release the lava so that the volcano can expand and flourish. It seems like tiring work, so you could violently smash the rock along with them. Gain 1 boost and continue.

162.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for a back-alley entrance after crossing the inlet
162.text: A door on the eastern side of the city is propped open to release the intense heat. You hear the clang of metal inside. If you enter, gain [a84fc0]1 look[-], go to city [b]Location 525[/b], and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 525[/b].

163.text: The beast rocks back and forth as if hoping you’ll play with it or give it a treat. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

164.action: [a84fc0]PREPARE[-] to sneak over to the eye
164.text: You perceptively notice a large figure lurking below the surface of the lava. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

1645.text: The victim is wrapped in sailcloth, and their partner hesitantly allows you to take a closer look, saying that no one has seen the body but them. They haven’t discussed it with anyone. Despite the volume of blood on the floorboards, the wound is narrow and shallow, about the length of your forearm—a clean cut.

165.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

166.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house from a safe distance
166.text: You can see shadows moving around the house, but before you move any closer, you notice the pustules on the tree near you are ready to burst. It’s probably safest to greet the occupants from your current position. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

167.text: The sentient is too exhausted to explain much, but they share the basics of smelting with you and warn you of the elemental to the east. Gain ability [b]Item 1475[/b] and 1 boost.

168.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

1680.text: In the dim lantern light, every shadow is a suspect. Your eyes grow heavy as the night wears on, but you’re alert enough to catch several street rats shimmying along the side of the bridge. Add 1 token to quest [b]Item 1680[/b].

1687.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1687.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1688.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1688.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1689.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1689.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

169.text: You can’t miss the massive elemental to the west of here, entrapped within a barrier nearly identical to the one before you. The Traveler explains that long ago, a fire wizard invented a way to forge new elementals. Their people decided to destroy this knowledge and never use it, as it would cause the end of the world. Gain 2 boost and continue.

1690.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1690.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1691.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1691.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1692.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1692.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

170.text: The sight is so completely foreign that you don’t know what the structure does, but you do recognize that the stone would fit perfectly in the concavity on the left side of the arch. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue.

choices.option: Pay 2 boost or [2694d0]1 move[-] to push the rock into the concavity
choices.outcome: The rock slides seamlessly into place. As it does, a jolt surges up your spine and down your arms. You’ve been endowed with a new power. Gain spell [b]Item 1367[/b].

1701.action: [a84fc0]REFLECT[-] on the joys of home ownership
1701.text: You sip contentedly on some tea as you appreciate the view. Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center; you have completed it and may end the game when you’re ready) and 1 boost on your character.

1705.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the rescue vessel toward your location, ending your adventure
1705.text: The game ends as you head back to your homeworld, and you achieve an epic victory if you have also completed the mission. Otherwise, it is impressive that you survived long enough to control your destiny, and your knowledge of the planet will benefit you in the future.

171.text: You avoid the lava while inspecting the orb. The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

172.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the boat away from the volcano
172.text: None of the leaf sentients on the ship are at the helm when you drag yourself onto the deck, so you take over while they compliment your navigation skills. Choose one:

choices.option: Guide the boat to the northwest shoreline
choices.outcome: In gratitude, the sentients put you on their shoulders and carry you over the ridge. During the trek, they discuss plans for their quest to free some enslaved miners to the north. Gain 1 time and quest [b]Item 1671[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply), then go to [b]Location 252[/b].

choices.option: Guide the boat to the east of the volcano
choices.outcome: The sentients grumble that you’ve steered them away from their destination to the northwest, but they’re happy to be alive. Gain 1 morale and $3, then go to [b]Location 173[/b].

173.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

174.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the fire sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ENDURE[/b][-] action.

175.text: You take a few steps back, which seems to assure the sentient that you don’t want any trouble. A whiff of the sparkling substance somehow both enhances and numbs your senses at the same time, and you’re simultaneously aware of some dancing sentients to the east, a large animal in the south, and an elemental monster to the west. Lose 1 health and gain 3 boost; you may continue.

176.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the sentients as they flail in the wind
176.text: You’re worried at first, but then your concerns turn to laughter as you realize the sentients are dancing around the twister! They might even be creating the funnel of dust with their wings. There is a pattern to their dance, and you quickly memorize it. Gain ability [b]Item 1469[/b]; you may continue.

177.text: You notice that there are a number of winged sentients in the area, but they all steer clear of this particular patch of land. It is probably sacred to them, and you’re pleased with yourself for figuring that out. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

178.text: You pretend not to notice the sentient while you inspect the flowers with care. They’re beautiful, and they give you a sense of appreciation for the life around you, but there is also something sad about them. Gain quest [b]Item 1629[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

179.text: The sentient is completely absorbed by the flowers, touching them, taking samples, even whispering to them. It’s endearing to see someone so entranced by nature. The smell of the flowers drifts over to you while you watch; the odor has a hint of something you can only describe as empathy or compassion, and you feel more connected to the sentients around you. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

180.text: The elder is a slow but eager teacher. They talk about the wind elemental to the west, a massive, ancient creature that is as revered as it is feared. Only an outsider would dare confront it. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-].

181.text: The sentients don’t say a word or acknowledge you, but you can feel tension in the air as you stand nearby. Something very important to them is in that chest. You’re surrounded in almost every direction by similar sentients going about their day in this prairie region, and the sounds of a city come from the north. Gain 1 boost and continue.

182.text: The sentient flexes as they help you to your feet, clearly pleased to have the upper hand. Pointing to the giant horn to the north, they explain that they’re just doing their job to protect the artifact. With a wink, they suggest that the first note is already in the correct position. Gain 2 boost.

183.text: At first it’s difficult to discern the sentient’s dance moves, but a distinct pattern emerges and you’re able to memorize it. Gain ability [b]Item 1469[/b].

184.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the wind queen, who welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]ENLIVEN[/b][-] action.

185.text: You identify a small snare among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; go to interior [b]Location 542[/b].

186.text: You follow sweetly scented smoke drifting from an open door. If you enter, gain [fff349]2 take[-], go to city [b]Location 518[/b], and continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ACCESS[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 518[/b].

187.text: Find card [b]Item 1140[/b] and place it on the table. You must demonstrate that you know the harmony of the winds by playing the sacred notes on the horn. Discern those notes based on the four previous performers, whose attempts are judged with feathers. The blue feathers represent how many times a correct note was played in the correct place in the melody. The red feathers represent how many times a correct note was played but in the wrong place. All other notes are incorrect. Proceed to study the previous attempts before announcing the four notes you will perform (from among A-G; order matters). See entry [b]Location 187[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

188.text: The old wind sentient, clearly distraught by the broken turbine, paces in front of you. “This has been in my family for generations. Sure, it’s a piece of junk now, but it was one of the first windmills of any kind in these parts. I feel like I’ve let my family down and that it’s too late to fix it.” Seeing that you’re in no rush and that you’re really listening, they stop pacing and start sharing fond memories of their childhood on this little patch of land. Gain ability [b]Item 1494[/b] and 1 morale; you may continue.

189.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the optimal path across the wetlands
189.text: As you listen to a rusty turbine creaking to the west, you find a way to leap from one sandbar to the next. Gain ability [b]Item 1486[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

019.action: [a84fc0]SOLVE[-] the glyph puzzle on the door
019.text: Your mind sometimes surprises you, and you’re able to trace the glyphs in the correct order. The door slides open. Gain 1 boost and go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 046[/b].

190.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 036[/b].

191.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

192.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the sentient to the north
192.text: The sentient is in the process of placing more flags into the ground, pausing to check their calculations before each placement. Gain 2 boost and continue.

193.text: “Sometimes I miss my childhood home, but I’ve called this planet my home for far too long to use that word reasonably for anywhere else. If anything, I miss feeling the grass beneath my feet or the wind in my hair.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

194.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the scene from a safe distance
194.text: At first you’re unsure what to make of it, but you soon realize that the two sentients are dueling with each other with immense power—they must be using some form of magic—and the tornado is simply a byproduct of the clash. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

195.text: The smell of a campfire leads you to a perch among the rocks. There you can see a campsite—a fire and two tents—but no campers. Gain 2 boost and continue.

196.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. The Traveler peeks inside and says, “You know, with enough effort you could repair the spaceship and return home.” Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

197.text: The sentient hesitates as you take in the surrounding area. They don’t seem like a threat—rather, you’re pretty sure they just want to place that flag in the right place in the ground. To the west you can see some remnants of your spaceship, and to the east an orb rests precariously between two foothills. Gain 2 boost and continue.

198.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

199.text: The sentient is quite proud of their trade, speaking of it as an art form. They even offer you an apprenticeship. Gain sentient [b]Item 1338[/b] and ability [b]Item 1471[/b].

020.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to swap out the magnetic rocks with something of similar size and weight, and you scour the cave entrance for the perfect object. Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and continue.

200.text: You can’t see anything above as you navigate through the thick clouds, but using clues on the surface you manage to find a route to a structure perched on a cliff. Go to interior [b]Location 563[/b] and gain 1 morale.

201.text: The sentient is patrolling a perimeter, but their attention is to the northeast and they don’t notice you. You notice another sentient working with a device to the east and a similar device to the south. Gain 2 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

202.text: In addition to the menacing-yet-friendly sentient and the technology they were working on, you see several patches of flowers. The sentient sees you admiring them and explains that they’re called dawnflare, and that certain animals are quite fond of them. Gain ability [b]Item 1497[/b] and 2 boost; you may continue.

203.text: From their stance and the motion of their eyes, you have the feeling that they’re guarding something—or someone— important inside the building. They might be susceptible to bribery, or you could probably take them in a fight. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. You may continue.

204.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house through a window
204.text: You’re excited to see a nice wok inside the house; gain 1 boost. Unless you’ve already determined whether the house is occupied, roll a challenge die. If the result is blank, no one is home. If the result is not blank, someone is home. When you finish your reconnaissance, the Traveler appears at your shoulder. “You know, you could save up money and buy a house like this.” Gain destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center) and continue.

205.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

206.text: You shimmy along the edge of the cliff until you find an open window. Peering inside, you see what appears to be a pawn shop. If you enter, gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-], go to city [b]Location 522[/b], and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 522[/b].

207.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the metal sentient, who welcomes you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fff349]take-[b]BYPASS[/b][-] action.

208.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

209.text: The animal appears to be looking for a fight, and you could escape by leaping south onto some floating islands or veering east to tropical waters. Gain 2 boost and continue.

021.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to leap, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Before you do, you may pay [fff349]1 take[-] or 2 boost to carefully unplug a device near the edge (gain item [b]Item 988[/b]). Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and continue.

210.text: Despite blending into the surrounding stones, it’s a solid block of metal. As you approach, you enter its magnetic field, and with a jolt you’re pulled toward the object, crashing hard and sticking to it. Lose 1 health. You can wrest free by paying [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; if you do, go north to [b]Location 215[/b]. Otherwise, you are stuck and must continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]EVADE[/b][-] or [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]CLEAVE[/b][-] action.

211.text: At first you assume the brilliant orange glow is the sentient themselves, but you realize it’s actually coming from an item they’re trying to hide. You might be able to steal it, or you could avoid creating a scene and just sneak past the sentient under the bridge. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

212.text: You remain perfectly still, watching the animal as it watches you. As big as it is, there’s something playful about the beast. You also notice a large lotus behind the animal. Gain 2 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

213.text: Several guards patrol the area. The light emanating from the building is so bright that you can’t make out its contents, but it does illuminate a runecaster near the rear of the ruins. Gain 2 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

214.text: After crawling over the ledge, you enter the cave. As your eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 034[/b].

215.text: The tavern is full of half-drunk (and fully drunk) sentients. You could have a drink with them or sneak into a side room. The device hovering near the building also intrigues you. Gain 2 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

216.text: You walk past the flowers to join a small tour group gathering near the entrance. One of them tosses a pebble at a gap in the fence, and it’s instantly repelled by a sizzling force field. A security officer guards the front door, but you blend into the group as they enter the museum. Gain 1 boost and go to interior [b]Location 564[/b].

217.text: Your keen eyes notice that despite the falling snow, there isn’t a flake of snow on any of the chain links—this must be an electric fence. You could disarm the electricity or find another way up and over the fence: Gain 2 boost and continue.

218.action: [a84fc0]STUDY[-] the properties of the magnetic rock
218.text: You can see why there is an aura of mystery and power around this place. As you examine the stone, you realize that your feet are no longer touching the ground—you are levitating in orbit around the stone with the other shards. You kick away, falling to the snow, a newfound power surging through you. Gain lesson [b]Item 1431[/b].

219.text: The sentient’s eyes never leave the horizon, scanning for non-existent threats while they take you under their tutelage. They explain that their job requires a combination of observation (ability [b]Item 1477[/b]) and defense (ability [b]Item 1478[/b])—gain one of those abilities.

022.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to modify the laser array, and you calculate the perfect angle to redirect the beams. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and continue.

220.text: You feel a surge of strength as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—a massive elemental using this shard as a weapon against an army of circuit sentients. Gain 1 boost.

221.text: The swift, aggressive animal appears to be guarding the cave. It calms when seeing you consider a more circuitous route. Gain 2 boost and continue.

222.text: It’s difficult to see through the snowstorm, but you hear the sounds of bleating to the far northeast. As scared as the young animal is, you can tell it’s built for fighting, so you may want to gain its trust with kindness. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

223.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—this area was the scene of a truce between the circuit and metal sentients. Gain 1 boost.

224.text: The areas to the north and west are snowy, but a break in the ridge to the east could take you toward a warmer area. The lumpy figures in the distance seem to be moving slowly across the valley—perhaps a herd of animals? Gain 2 boost and continue.

225.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] through an open seam in the bigger tent, waiting until its occupants take a stroll
225.text: Your eyes light up when you see a shovel inside. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; go to interior [b]Location 551[/b].

226.text: At first you think some sort of intense bonfire was creating the beam of light, but the more you watch it, the more you’re convinced there is some sort of glowing item at the source. Gain 2 boost and continue.

227.text: It’s a little different from what you pictured from the books you read as an imaginative child, but there’s no mistaking a flying carpet. The device is touch-sensitive, and it counterbalances against your weight. Looking around, you can’t see its owner. Gain ability [b]Item 1490[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, also gain vehicle [b]Item 985[/b]; if not, continue.

228.text: You wave to the sentient as you walk to the edge of the cliff. It’s a long, steep descent to the bottom, and the cliff extends to the east and west—not too far to the east, though. You could probably even climb the nearby tower to get a better view of the swamp below. Perhaps you could enlist the sentient to show you around? Gain ability [b]Item 1497[/b] and 1 morale, and gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]. You may continue.

229.text: Other than Moonstone Mountain itself—which you can imagine that sentients in the valley below might be looking for—you don’t see an end to the cliff in either direction. There is, however, a tower directly to the west that might help. Gain 1 boost and continue.

023.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to destroy the gate, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] and continue.

230.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

231.text: Find cards [b]Item 1137[/b]–[b]Item 1139[/b] and place them on the table. As you do, the air around you is filled with different types of energy: thermal, electric, and chemical. To wrest the gauntlet away from its anchor, you must fully understand how the three types of energy fit together. Assemble the cards so they form 3 digits, then speak those digits in ascending order. See entry [b]Location 231[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

232.text: The longer you watch, the more the light begins to resemble an intelligent life form. You realize you’re witnessing the birth of a sentient made of pure energy. The light is the same color as the lanterns that hang all around you—they must be where this type of sentient lives. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost.

233.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] a cipher for the judges (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
233.text: Find cards [b]Item 1147[/b]–[b]Item 1149[/b] and place them on the table. An energy sentient points to the lanterns surrounding you on this location (cards [b]Item 1147[/b] and [b]Item 1148[/b]), each of which is etched with images of sparks, fire, rocks, mountains, blood, and water in various quantities. The sentient also hands you a scroll with four runes written on it (card [b]Item 1149[/b]). Your goal is to translate the scroll, which describes a universal mantra involving two numbers and two words. See entry [b]Location 233[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

234.text: The trio isn’t particularly eager to teach anything to a complete stranger, but they can’t resist the appeal of learning a new language. After you share a few words with them, they teach you some basic spirit magic and recommend that you stay away from the deadly plants in this area of the swamp. Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b], 1 boost, and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

235.action: [a84fc0]LEARN[-] about the environment from the Traveler
235.text: “Where we’re standing right now is one of the few places where you could dig, if that’s something you’re into,” the Traveler says. Gain 1 boost and continue.

236.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

237.text: The sentient is eager to practice your language, though they seem a bit nervous. “I don’t like to be this close to the elemental,” they say. “These lanterns are offerings—tiny pieces of our souls—to the energy elemental to the north. We fear it as much as we revere it.” They teach you a bit of spirit magic so you can experience what it feels like to draw energy from your soul. Gain lesson [b]Item 1425[/b] and 1 morale.

238.text: You find yourself in a busy room with pink sentients rushing in and out. If you enter, gain [2694d0]2 move[-], go to city [b]Location 520[/b], and continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]ENTER[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 520[/b].

239.text: Several sentients are admiring a beautiful array of fancy lanterns. You also notice a mysterious green elixir. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

024.text: The barrier is a pitch-black, endless void. Finally you emerge much deeper into the planet; go to cave [b]Location 084[/b].

240.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

241.text: As far as you can tell, this stone acts as a warning for the monstrous elemental to the east. Gain 1 boost and continue.

242.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

243.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

244.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

245.text: Your augsuit goes haywire as you step in the water around the flower. Disoriented, you stumble backwards. Lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost; you may continue.

246.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

247.text: The heated discussion is difficult to comprehend fully, but you gather that these three sentients represent major factions. On the left is someone who believes it is the duty of energy sentients to offer their energy to other sentients. On the right is someone who urges other energy sentients to exact revenge on those who sap their energy. In the middle is someone content to simply live out their life in the swamp. Gain ability [b]Item 1494[/b] and 3 boost; you may continue.

248.text: As you read the runes, they fill your field of vision. Something magical enters your comprehension as if you’ve always known it. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b].

249.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the animal while it observes you
249.text: The staring contest ends with you blinking, which delights the animal. Gain animal [b]Item 823[/b] and 1 boost.

025.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to destroy the gate, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] and continue.

250.text: Despite the cool breeze from the west, you can tell how hot the area to the east and northeast is. You’re curious whether the temperatures bother the sentients walking in the distance. As for more immediate matters, there might be a way to reach the pink box on the ledge, but you risk pricking yourself on the rocky thorns. Gain 2 boost and continue.

251.text: Your keen eyes notice two very important details. Firstly, the hole in the ground isn’t a hole at all—it’s a giant, gaping mouth. Secondly, wedged between two of those teeth is a shiny object, some sort of jewelry. Gain 2 boost, then you may choose one or neither:

choices.option: [2694d0]move-◆2-[b]DESCEND[/b][-] into the pit toward the jewelry
choices.outcome: The ground lurches beneath you, and all goes black. Go to cave [b]Location 049[/b].
Without leaving your perch on the outer rim, you delicately remove the jewelry. Gain item [b]Item 991[/b].

252.text: The sentient stares back at you for a moment but doesn’t seem to consider you a threat, so they turn back to their work, which seems to involve the airborne animals. You also notice the gaping mouth of a sand centipede to the west. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill. If you pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-], also gain sentient [b]Item 1331[/b]; if you don’t pay, you may continue.

253.text: The treasure chest is sturdy (but eroded by sand), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

254.text: You realize that it’s not one but two animals that created these footprints. You can tell from the tracks that the animal to the north is hungry and that the animal to the east is scared. Choose one:Gain 1 boost and go north to [b]Location 259[/b].Gain 1 boost and go east to [b]Location 443[/b].Gain 1 random skill and continue.

255.text: The sentients immediately back away—they were just excited to meet you. They explain that they’re ready to go on a hunt, but they always hunt as a trio, not a duo. Gain sentient [b]Item 1333[/b], 1 boost, and quest [b]Item 1649[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).

256.text: It looks like the beast died from sunstroke. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

257.text: It soon becomes clear that the leaf sentient has stumbled into a trap made of bones. Without your help they will succumb to the elements, to the beasts, or to whoever laid the trap. The question is: Do they deserve to be saved? Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

258.text: The sentient complains of the cooler temperatures to the southeast. They carry an amazing array of bone-crafted items, including a $3 pair of climbing shoes (item [b]Item 963[/b]), a $4 mace (item [b]Item 969[/b]), a $6 lyre (item [b]Item 970[/b]), and an $8 sword (item [b]Item 888[/b]). You may either buy one of them (gain the card) or gain $1.

259.text: The animal acknowledges you with a slight bow before ambling toward a sentient to the west; perhaps it has a kind heart. Gain 1 morale and choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-], then continue.

Your eyes are also drawn to the bottom rune on the rocky column. Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll 4 skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location.
