Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

choices.option: Pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and place your hand on a rune
choices.outcome: A hidden door opens in the base of the stone spire, revealing a staircase leading into a massive underground cavern. Go to cave [b]Location 099[/b].

choices.option: Pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] to pluck a spiky desert flora
choices.outcome: Gain flora [b]Item 1053[/b].

026.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to swap out the widgets with something of similar size and weight, and you scour the cave entrance for the perfect object. Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and continue.

260.action: [a84fc0]SCAN[-] the area for any available skeletons
260.text: You’re happy to see that there are several large, sunbaked skeletons to the southeast. You point the octopod in that direction, and they reward you with a hearty two-tentacle hug. Gain 2 morale. Your act of kindness inspires the Traveler to offer you some advice. “With enough money, you can buy pretty much anything, including a new ship. Maybe visit the casino to the northeast?” Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1607[/b] (place it in the center).

261.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the sinew sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]HUNT[/b][-] action.

262.text: Your search yields several interesting results. Choose one:

choices.option: Behind the city is the mouth of a cave; enter it
choices.outcome: Go to cave [b]Location 027[/b].

choices.option: A gateway on the northern end of the city is decorated with a variety of bones; enter the city there.
choices.outcome: Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-], go to city [b]Location 524[/b], and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action there.

choices.option: Enter the city through the main gate.
choices.outcome: Go to city [b]Location 524[/b].

263.text: The odor has a hint of fresh water and vitality to it. Just as you inhale the tempting odor, a hard object smashes you in the head. Then another. Then another. It’s the plant—its bulbous roots are attacking you! Gain 1 boost. Roll 2 skill dice, and gain all [ec1c3b]overpower[-] results, then lose 1 health unless you pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]. You may continue.

264.text: You identify some dusty barrels among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; go to interior [b]Location 543[/b].

265.text: From what you hear, the lead sentient is a bounty hunter who has captured a hacker from the cold west. You also notice a hulking elemental far in the distance. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

266.text: Your keen eyes notice several intriguing targets. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The bustling casino seems to be a major attraction, especially in this heat. The employees are inviting anyone and everyone inside. As you get closer, you notice a shiny coin on the ground. Gain $X and 1 boost; you may continue.

choices.option: Smell the lotus to the right
choices.outcome: It smells like coconut. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

267.text: You watch the sentient for a few minutes, and it quickly becomes clear that they’re maintaining the oasis in the middle of the desert—perhaps even trying to expand it. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

268.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler explain the situation
268.text: The Traveler shakes their head. “Historically, the sinew and leaf sentients haven’t gotten along, but in modern times they’ve kept an uneasy peace. This spoiled prince could ruin everything with his repeated attacks, though fortunately most sinew people don’t listen to him.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

269.text: Your keen eyes notice that the funnel, while dangerous and growing in size, isn’t veering from its current position. You may go northwest to [b]Location 273[/b] or northeast to [b]Location 447[/b], or continue.

027.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to modify the laser array, and you calculate the perfect angle to redirect the beams. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and continue.

270.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. You have a bad feeling about opening it with anything other than near-perfect execution. Gain 2 boost and continue.

271.text: Among the gleaming ivory you find an impressive sword. Gain item [b]Item 892[/b]; you may continue with any action other than [fff349]take-[b]SCAVENGE[/b][-].

272.text: At first the blobs appeared solid to you, but upon closer inspection you realize that they’re constantly twisting, shifting, and changing. Passing sentients keep a safe distance from them, some of them heading to cooler climates to the northeast and northwest. Gain 2 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

273.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

274.text: The odor has a hint of dry bone. Gain 1 boost and continue.

275.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

276.text: The sentients take a break to explain basic information about the world’s oldest game. They roll a few dice, then each player selects 1 card from their collection for a brief duel against their opponent. Gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b], and gain either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

277.text: The beast’s rage is more of a response to its chains than its natural demeanor. While there surely is a way to pass through without harm, you could also free the animal. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

278.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for a gap in the wall
278.text: There are a few dark windows in the wall that could branch into deeper tunnels. As you draw close to one of them, several cloaked figures jump out of it and surround you. Gain 1 boost and read entry [b]Location 278[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

279.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

028.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to befriend the sentinel, and you calculate the perfect conversation starter. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and continue.

280.text: The sentient advises you to explore the desert to the east if you’re looking for a crystal that will improve your ability to help and create. You sense there is something else they want to say, but they trail off. Gain 1 boost and continue.

281.text: The main entrance to the building—which appears to be the only entrance—is wide open, and the campfire indicates to you that someone is already inside. You arm yourself with a torch from the fire before proceeding. Gain item [b]Item 1087[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

282.text: It looks like the beast died from thirst. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

283.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

284.text: As you prepare to extract the crystal, you perceptively notice the three treasure chests conspicuously at the base of the rock. Why so many chests all in one place? Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

285.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

286.text: Your eyes don’t fool you—these really are three separate sentients merged into one. They don’t seem to notice you or care about their valuables, as they’re busy bickering among themselves. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

287.text: It is a treacherous ascent, but you find a well-worn route leading to a sprawling room inside the mountain. Go to interior [b]Location 592[/b] and gain 1 morale.

288.text: The tiny creature seems incredibly nervous. Whenever it starts to move to your left, they look up at you expectantly. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

289.text: The outcropping provides a nice foundation for you to build a bridge, though it may be easier simply to get the attention of the passing balloon. Gain 2 boost and continue.

029.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to modify the laser array, and you calculate the perfect angle to redirect the beams. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

290.text: It looks like the beast was eaten by a sand centipede. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

291.text: Even in the dark, you can sense small tremors of movement in the sand near the spiky protrusions. You might be safest moving somewhere other than north. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

292.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 025[/b].

293.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

294.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] through an open seam in the bigger tent, waiting for its occupants to get some fresh air
294.text: Your eyes light up when you see some climbing gear inside the tent. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; go to interior [b]Location 552[/b].

295.text: The sentient gestures for you to join them. As they work, they explain the basics of creating and manipulating glass. They guide you through the process of making a glass trinket (gain item [b]Item 1091[/b]).

296.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—this area was the scene of a truce between the sand sentients to the south and gold sentients to the north, where it looks a bit warmer. Gain 1 boost.

297.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the silence of the expanse
297.text: As soon as you become fully aware of the quiet, you realize that the desert isn’t entirely silent. A muffled roar emerges from deep underground. Gain 1 boost and continue.

298.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stones and the rune etched into them. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this area was a meeting place between friendly gold, metal, and energy sentients. Their discussion focused on the area to the east that would one day host the towers you now see there, as well as their concerns about some corrupted runecasters that were causing some issues to the southeast. The vision also indicates warmer temperatures to the north. Gain 2 boost.

299.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

030.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to befriend the sentinel, and you calculate the perfect conversation starter. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and continue.

300.text: It’s hard to see at first, but when the beast pauses for breath, you can see a large thorn irritating its eye. It may be difficult to heal the animal without first calming or subduing it. Gain 1 boost and either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

301.text: Ducking behind a rock, you scan the valley. In the middle of the circle, a blue sentient is tied to a rock. Pink energy flows from them into the surrounding sentients; some of it even reaches you. Soon the sentient grows limp, and the ceremony ends. Gain ability [b]Item 1483[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

302.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about the birds
302.text: “These birds are almost biologically identical to those found on your world, and they’re trained to deliver messages. In many places you can simply relax to birdsong, and they might even inspire you to send a signal to your home planet using a tower.” Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

303.text: As you trace the lines on the stone, three distinctly colored icons emerge. You may choose to focus on one of the three. If you choose the green icon, gain spell [b]Item 1236[/b]. If you choose the pink icon, gain spell [b]Item 1237[/b]. If you choose the blue icon, gain spell [b]Item 1238[/b].

304.text: A one-eyed guard stands on the edge of the cliff, anxiously watching the approaching pirate ship. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

305.text: As far as you can tell, the lighthouse is currently unoccupied. You hear a sentient humming to themselves to the west; perhaps that’s the lighthouse keeper. The door is locked, but the hinge looks weak. Gain 2 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

306.text: You perceptively notice that the 5 nearest floating islands are all positioned in clear view of the shard. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

307.text: It looks like the goliath died from loneliness. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

308.action: [a84fc0]INSPECT[-] either the animal or the orb

choices.outcome: You wade around the animal, looking it up and down for the source of its pain. You find it—a large fishhook has left a long gash in its back and is still wedged there. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]HEAL[/b][-] or [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]RELIEVE[/b][-] action.

The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

309.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about your mission
309.text: “If you’re on a treasure hunt, there may be no better partners than these pirates.” Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

031.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to befriend the sentinel, and you calculate the perfect conversation starter. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and continue.

310.text: When you look closely at the rainbow, you notice that it’s more than just a refraction of light—it’s composed of crystal dust. Gain ability [b]Item 1492[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost; you may continue.

311.text: You find that the path leads underwater by design. You follow the steps until you’re fully submerged. Choose one:

choices.option: Suffer 1 hypoxia damage to proceed even deeper
choices.outcome: After inhaling too much water, you emerge dripping wet in an underground cave. Go to cave [b]Location 089[/b].
Gain 1 boost and continue.

312.text: The footprints in the sand suggest that the owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and continue.

313.text: You get the feeling that the animal is watching you with just as much curiosity as with which you’re watching it. Perhaps it’s your imagination, but you think you see tiny flames atop the bird’s crest. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

314.text: The owner of the boat is nowhere to be seen, but you hear a voice inside the nearby cave. Either take the boat (gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b]) or venture into the cave (go to cave [b]Location 037[/b]).

315.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] a few pages of the book
315.text: Look at page 26 of the Book of Vantages to learn about flora; gain 1 boost and continue.

316.text: Even up close, the animal is nearly indistinguishable from a large mushroom, albeit one that can walk and make sounds. It seems to have a friendly disposition. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

317.text: The terrified animal stumbles forward and blends into the trees near the lotus. As you watch, another animal—a giant lizard—emerges from the brush and is immediately entranced by the sweet-smelling lotus. Gain animal [b]Item 851[/b].

318.text: Set aside 6 cubes representing water. Roll exactly 10 skill dice and randomly arrange 9 of them into a 3x3 grid. Use the extra die to push a row or column so that the extra die enters the grid; a new extra die will emerge from the other end. When it does, you may reroll the new extra die once by spending a water cube. Proceed to push the extra die into the grid, repeating the process. The goal is for each row or column to have 3 identical icons (e.g., the first row has 3 orange icons, the second row has 3 green icons, and the third row has 3 blue icons). Succeed if you accomplish this goal; gain item [b]Item 1008[/b] and perform no other location actions here. If you spend all water tokens and can’t reroll to make the goal possible, you fail and lose 1 morale.

319.text: The creature seems to have no issue with you watching it work. It’s using the rocks as a canvas for a gold fluid secreted by its claws. You can’t make any sense of it, and this could be an easy opportunity to capture or even kill the animal. Gain 1 boost and either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

032.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to destroy the gate, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] and continue.

320.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

321.text: The sentient is distracted by an onrush of young sentients; they say that they’ll teach you soon if you get in line. Go to interior [b]Location 600[/b].

322.text: The eager sentient explains the meaning of the various positions of petals in their flower arrangement, for which they used the tropical arecaceae flora. Gain ability [b]Item 1465[/b].

323.text: It takes you a few minutes to catch up, but fortunately this is a beginner class. The instructor is explaining the sacrifice required to tap into life mana. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b].

324.text: Through the swirling energy that forms the animal’s body, you see the glimmer of a bright orange crystal and an angry flare around a metal spike in its leg. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

325.text: The netting is similar to a spider web’s, but the strands are thick as a rope and razor-sharp. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

326.text: The arachnoid creature waits patiently for unwitting prey… or a reason to defend itself. You could placate it if you provide a meal for it instead of serving yourself as the meal. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

327.text: It’s a sturdy treasure chest featuring a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Concerning, though, is the alarm embedded in its base. Gain 2 boost and continue.

328.text: The sentient refuses to let you pass. Instead, they recommend that you take a whiff of the nearby lotus and then be on your way. Gain 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

329.text: In the hope of finding a way to untether their people from this planet, the sentient sought the legendary elder dragon, but they failed to find their mark. Gain quest [b]Item 1670[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

033.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to leap, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and continue.

330.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

331.text: The tree is oddly odorless, which would indicate that its composition is pure gold. You’ve never seen anything like it, and you suspect this tree is sacred to those who live in the area. Gain 1 boost and continue.

332.text: With the wind pressing you against the village walls, you find a hidden door. Inside you see a dark hallway capped by a door with a band of light at eye level. If you enter, gain [fff349]2 take[-], go to city [b]Location 530[/b], and continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ACCESS[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 530[/b].

333.text: There’s an elaborate welding device nearby that you could probably grab if the store owner were distracted. It’s just you and them on this quiet plateau—no one would know if you rob or even accost the owner. Gain 2 boost and continue.

334.text: The sentient’s biological matter seems to be the gold fluid itself, the outer husk a vessel or exoskeleton. They are in dire need of help. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

335.text: It looks like the peddler—who is conveniently absent—specializes in equipment for explorers, as you see a compass and a climbing axe among the supplies there. Gain 2 boost and continue.

336.text: This caravan is a merchant procession, and their main feature seems to be large husks. Gain 1 boost and continue.

337.text: Based on the impenetrable armor and lack of trust from the driver, you will be hard-pressed to hitch a ride or to raid the vehicle. You spot a weakness, however, in the “belly” of the transport that you could use to steal a few coins. Gain 2 boost and continue.

338.text: This playground for the rich isn’t the type of place you can just walk into (figuratively or literally). Wealthy sentients lounge about while they’re served by an overly attentive staff. You overhear one of the guests mention suspiciously that they hope the staff won’t steal the ring they left in their room. Gain 2 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

339.text: The sentients invite you to join their boisterous game. You will try to create the best poker-style hand of dice compared to 2 competing sentients. For this game, roll 2 skill dice for yourself, set aside 4 skill dice for the sentients (2 dice each; you don’t know their results yet), and reserve 3 shared skill dice. Roll 1 shared die. With that knowledge, you may reroll one or both of your dice simultaneously. Then roll the second shared die. Again, you may reroll one or both of your dice. One final time, roll the third shared die, then you may reroll one or both of your dice. Now roll both of the other gamblers’ dice to see their final results (two sets of 2 dice each). The order of possible results from worst to best are one of a kind, one pair, two pairs, three of a kind, full house, four of a kind, and five of a kind. See entry [b]Location 339[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

034.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to befriend the sentinel, and you calculate the perfect conversation starter. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and continue.

340.text: The owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

341.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the gold sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action.

342.text: While looking through the brush, you find a hidden tunnel leading directly into the city embassy. If you enter, gain [0b955e]2 help[-], go to city [b]Location 529[/b], and continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]OFFER[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 529[/b].

343.text: The structures to the north appear to be vacant, perhaps deserted in lieu of the newer city to the west. Just because this society decided not to live here any longer doesn’t mean you couldn’t build something on the river bank. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

344.text: Your suspicions are confirmed—the “city” in the distance is a well-crafted mirage. When you point this out to a local, they offer you a mischievous glance. Depending on who you ask, they say, the illusion was either created to confuse invaders or to make the land of the gold sentients appear more opulent than it really is. Impressed at your perception, the sentient teaches you a spell-related lesson. Gain lesson [b]Item 1426[/b].

345.text: The animal’s big eyes blink in fear. Your choice to watch instead of act is a death sentence for the animal. Lose 1 morale and gain 1 boost.

346.text: There is someone moving around on the top floor. The building has the feel of a fortress, but that doesn’t explain the sparkling wind. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

347.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

348.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

349.text: The sounds of civilization trickle in from the south, while the smell of healthier flowers wafts from the north. You can sense that the Traveler is willing to share information with you, and you might take a closer look at the nearby tower—it looks like it could serve several purposes. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

035.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to swap out the jelly-like substance with something of similar weight, and you scour the cave entrance for the perfect object. Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and continue.

350.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 029[/b].

351.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it. You also find yourself focusing on the purple rune on the bank of the river. Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

352.text: The sentient’s teaching skills are rough around the edges, but you pick up the core concepts by watching them. Gain ability [b]Item 1461[/b] and 1 health; you may continue.

353.text: The air gets colder as you approach the tower, which is attempting to manipulate the mild climate through a combination of technology and something you can best describe as magic. Your close examination results in some of that magic merging with you. Gain spell [b]Item 1377[/b].

354.text: The odor reminds you of formaldehyde, which makes you squirm a bit. You’re glad no one is around to see you. Gain 1 boost and continue.

355.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 2 boost. You also find a sweet-smelling lotus nearby. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

356.text: As you watch, a massive tongue flicks out of the spiky circle and grabs a bird out of the air. You might be wise to distract the underwater creature before moving north. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

357.text: As you watch what looks at first like an act of destruction, you realize that the sentients inside the house seem to appreciate the fire—they’re basking in it. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]2 engage[-]; you may continue.

358.text: The sentient nods, then continues their conversation with the Traveler. They speak of the embarrassment of the sinew elemental to the southwest and that they would offer riches to anyone who freed the elemental. Gain quest [b]Item 1633[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

359.text: The sentient’s attention remains on the fishing rod, but they talk slowly about various methods of catching fish (gain ability [b]Item 1461[/b]).

036.text: The barrier is a pitch-black, endless void. Finally you emerge much deeper into the planet; go to cave [b]Location 096[/b].

360.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

361.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

362.text: You pull a leaf toward you, and it sticks to your fingers. You pry it loose, considering uses for this adhesive flora. Gain 1 boost and continue.

363.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

364.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

365.text: Despite the salty water splashing into your eyes, you notice two important details: Firstly, the water is curiously calm under the surface. Secondly, the lights in the distance seem to be emanating from the same, unmoving position. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

366.text: While fish nibble at the bait, a storm brews to the west. A treasure chest bobs on the tide to the east. If you want to go north, you’ll need to be able to hold your breath. Gain any 3 skills and continue.

367.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

368.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

369.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

037.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to destroy the gate, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] and continue.

370.text: The waters to the east are protected by metal rods, and there’s a treasure chest to the south that intrigues you. You can’t look away, however, from the creepy elemental to the west. Gain 2 boost and continue.

371.text: The flower has absolutely no aroma at all. Gain 1 boost and continue.

372.text: Based on the pattern on the far shore, the safe path clearly appears to be the green lily pads. You’re unsure of the dangers that lurk beneath the surface, but it’s bad enough that several shock rods to the west keep it contained here. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

373.text: The creature is similar in size to the larger dinosaurs of Old Earth. This beast’s anatomy is unique in that it seems to have an entire ecosystem of flora growing from its leafy scales. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

374.text: The animal seems protective of the barrels half-buried along the shoreline, so you stay clear of them. Seeing your effort, the animal’s posture and tone shift to friendly, even chatty. Gain animal [b]Item 838[/b].

375.text: The owners of the boat wave at you and signal to avoid trouble to the south. Gain 1 boost and continue.

376.text: A lone sentient is inside the building, occasionally warming a large egg with a blowtorch. Gain 2 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

377.text: The odor smells a bit like a charcoal grill. The sentients to the east heckle you and ask why you’re smelling such a scalding hot flower. Gain 1 boost and continue.

378.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the sentients hawk their wares
378.text: Each merchant specializes in a different type of item. There are vendors for crystals, tools, weapons, garments, maps, and even flora. Their prices seem reasonable, and they’re constantly shouting over each other. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and continue.

379.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

038.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to swap out the stones with something of similar weight, and you scour the cave entrance for the perfect object. Gain [fff349]1 take[-] and continue.

380.text: The animal is in great pain, to the point that it can barely move. A closer examination reveals something wedged under its shell, putting pressure on the animal’s spine. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

381.text: The odd vessel appears to be unowned and fully autonomous. The driver steers the large turtle from inside the bulbous cabin, which can carry a landwalker like you underwater or an ocean dweller onto land. Gain 2 boost and continue.

382.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the surrounding area for the source of the gash
382.text: You had a hunch that the cause of the broken boulder—which is still in the process of mending itself—is nearby, and that hunch was correct. In the bushes you find a mysterious sword. Gain item [b]Item 889[/b].

383.text: Your approach leaves the sentient hesitant, but once they start talking, you get the impression that they haven’t had anyone to converse with in a long time. While sharing a snack with you, they explain that they run the nearby lighthouse, a job bestowed upon them due to their excellent vision. They’ve recently noticed a curious box of pure light to the north, and they ask you kindly to investigate it. Gain 1 health and quest [b]Item 1672[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

384.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little moss-worn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

385.text: You identify a hammock among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; go to interior [b]Location 544[/b].

386.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

387.text: You can’t picture a better place to build a farm. There are sentients in the area you could hire to help, or you could do it yourself. Gain 2 boost and continue.

388.text: The rushing water churns the mud, turning the river a dark brown—swimming north against the current will prove difficult. There’s a long bridge leading into the city to the west, but it’s heavily guarded by sentients collecting tolls from arriving travelers. Gain 2 boost and continue.

389.text: The odor has a zest to it, giving you a surge of adrenaline. Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may continue.

039.text: The barrier is a pitch-black, endless void. Finally you emerge much deeper into the planet; go to cave [b]Location 099[/b].

390.text: Among the berries you find a small hole in the wall. You may wiggle through it to go west to [b]Location 787[/b].

391.text: The wall here seems lower than other places; you could probably scale it. The ground is soft from a recent rainfall, so you could even dig under the wall. Gain 2 boost, and gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

392.text: With the sounds of a large city carrying over the wall, you can see what appears to be some sort of metallic beast in the distance. To the east are several massive animals in flight. Gain 2 boost and continue.

393.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

394.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

395.text: Aside from the magnetic objects, there are some flowers to the west that are twice as tall as you. You are perhaps the most excited to see part of your crashed spaceship to the south. Gain 2 boost and continue.

396.text: Sentients occasionally come and go, but overall there really isn’t much activity at the building. You could probably scale the tower or even just access the building through the front door. Gain 2 boost and any 1 skill; you may continue.

397.text: The smell of rotten eggs is even more powerful when you position your nose directly above the lotus. Despite the odor, there’s something about the scent that clears your mind. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

398.text: The sounds of conflict drift from the west, while a cool breeze from the east makes you shiver. A flock of birds seems to delight some sentients far down the path to the north. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

399.text: Two details catch your eye. Firstly, something green glimmers from behind the frozen waterfall to the east. Secondly, the only way to get to that waterfall is to slide across the thin ice. Gain 2 boost and continue.

040.text: There are several ways you could approach the artifact, each as difficult as the next. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

400.text: The cliff runs right against the tower, so you’re able to get quite close. It’s teeming with information—with enough effort, you could probably hack it or even just tear off a piece of it and use it as you wish. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill; you may continue.

401.text: Each tower is around twice your height, tall enough that they can probably send or receive signals to a hub. Most peculiar are the outlets at the base—they seem designed for something or someone to plug into. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

402.text: The wall ends not far south of here, but if you want to cross over east to [b]Location 621[/b] now, you may do so if you pay [fd8c46]1 engage[-] to convince a gatekeeper to let you in. Otherwise gain 1 boost and continue.

403.action: [a84fc0]TRACK[-] the footprints in the snow to their source
403.text: The footprints lead you to a hidden side entrance. If you choose to enter, go to interior [b]Location 581[/b]. Otherwise gain 1 boost and refresh 1 challenge die from your grid; you may continue.

404.action: [a84fc0]SCAN[-] the ruins from a distance for anything useful
404.text: You identify a grappling hook among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; go to interior [b]Location 545[/b].

405.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

406.text: The scared creature is stuck on the island, and you suspect it won’t last long once the birds notice it. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

407.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

408.text: You spy on the area, identifying a pair of binoculars inside the building and a lotus on the edge of the cliff. Gain 1 boost, then choose one:

choices.outcome: You prepare to descend into the building. You may continue.
Pluck the lotus to gain flora 1159. You may continue.

409.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about your mission
409.text: “If you’re trying to incite a coup on your homeworld, the far-reaching circuit sentients who built these spires could be perfect allies.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

041.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the dark, labyrinthine alleys and arches until you reach a mysterious business
041.text: You feel a wave of nausea as you enter a den of dark magic, despite how eager the sentients inside are to share their knowledge with you. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn the building blocks for controlling memory
choices.outcome: Gain lesson [b]Item 1430[/b].

choices.option: Learn the foundational elements for transfiguring items
choices.outcome: Gain lesson [b]Item 1432[/b].

410.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house through a window
410.text: You’re excited to see some climbing equipment inside; gain 1 boost. Unless you’ve already determined whether the house is occupied, roll a challenge die. If the result is blank, no one is home. If the result is not blank, someone is home. You may continue.

411.text: Sentients—mostly by themselves, but occasionally in pairs—make their way along the path to the base of the runestone, where they kneel and touch their forehead to the great rock. They all seem to glow with joy when they walk away. Gain 2 boost and continue.

412.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

413.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

414.text: Amidst the rubble you find a harpoon bow. Gain item [b]Item 960[/b] and continue with any action other than [fff349]take-[b]LOOT[/b][-].

415.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

416.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weather-worn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

417.text: The sentient is carrying several small items up the staircase. Gain 2 boost and continue.

418.text: It looks like the beast died in a volcanic eruption. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

choices.outcome: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

You feel a surge of strength as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the past—hulking animals wandered these lands, migrating to warmer or colder climates based on the season. Gain 2 boost.

042.text: After comparing each of the images—which appear to be live footage from hidden cameras—you notice that each of the interiors contains a ring with a different gem. One camera appears to be offline. Gain ability [b]Item 1492[/b] and 5 boost; exit to city [b]Location 041[/b].

420.text: The furry critter is probably a juvenile, and they must have fallen behind the herd you can see to the northwest. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

421.text: One is badly injured, and the other bleats helplessly, unable to steer their companion away from the edge. You find the sounds easy to mimic. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

422.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

423.text: You’re at the confluence of east and west, warm and cold. This is no man’s land, yet you see potential for this to be a place for sentients to gather—it makes sense why someone would start to build a structure here. You could attempt to finish their work or simply scavenge the remains. Gain 2 boost and continue.

424.text: The design and the cords make you think the devices might be range extenders. One of the cords is disconnected, as if it were abruptly cut. Gain 2 boost and continue.

425.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

426.text: The hungry beast seems equally at home above and below the water, like a river dragon of ancient legends from your world. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

427.text: The sentient alternates between scanning the horizon with a pair of large binoculars and practicing a series of close-combat maneuvers. Gain 1 boost and either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

428.text: As you smell the salty flower, a brief vision of the future flashes before your eyes. Roll two separate sets of 2 challenge dice; choose 1 set to use as part of your next action this turn (they count toward the challenge dice to roll for that action). Continue.

429.text: The sentient lurking to the west is making you nervous, and you’re excited to notice a blunt object at your feet under the water. Gain item [b]Item 906[/b] and continue.

043.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the nest from a safe distance
043.text: The squishy sound of dozens of baby centipedes roiling in the nest makes your skin crawl. You distract yourself by scanning other parts of the cave, and it’s then that you notice a small hole on the right. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

430.text: The roiling funnels turn this way and that, but you recognize a pattern and slip through at the right moment. Go north to [b]Location 431[/b].

431.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

432.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

433.text: The owner of the boat isn’t far from here, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost, and gain [2694d0]1 move[-], [fd8c46]1 engage[-], or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

434.text: You shield your eyes from a nearly blinding light to the east; the wishing well to the west looks more welcoming. Your ears are tickled by the sound of an animal near the shore. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

435.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

436.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

437.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

438.text: You may either give the sailor a recommendation for a destination in the area in exchange for a snack (gain 1 health) or join them to navigate while they row (gain vehicle [b]Item 1014[/b]).

439.text: Find card [b]Location 802[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. Roll and place 2 skill dice on each of the circles. Also gain 6 cubes (time tokens). To escape from the time loop, you must manipulate the mancala so that all dice of each type are in their own circle—before it’s too late.Lose a time token to pick up all dice from a single circle and then—clockwise— place 1 of those dice onto each successive circle. You may skip any circle that contains 1 or more dice of a given color and no other dice. Repeat this until you either run out of time tokens or all dice of each type are in their own circle (e.g., all orange dice are in the same circle, all green dice are in the same circle, and so on). When you run out of time tokens or succeed, read entry [b]Location 439[/b] in the Book of Secrets.

044.text: The creature places its entire mouth over you and then inhales sharply—it’s smelling you. While you’re inside the jaws of the centipede, you notice a flash of blue on one of its teeth. The beast withdraws, slithering slowly past you. Gain 1 morale and 1 boost; you may continue.

440.text: As you watch, the animals swarm above one of the devices, which rises from the lava and blinks to life. The forging process is complete. Roll a skill die and gain the resulting item: [2694d0]move[-] (item [b]Item 1028[/b]), [a84fc0]look[-] (item [b]Item 1030[/b]), [fd8c46]engage[-] (item [b]Item 1026[/b]), [0b955e]help[-] (item [b]Item 1029[/b]), [fff349]take[-] (item [b]Item 1031[/b]), or [ec1c3b]overpower[-] (item [b]Item 1027[/b]). You may continue.

441.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

442.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 1 boost and any 1 skill. Continue.

443.text: The beast slows their approach then sees that you mean no harm. In the best way they can, they communicate that their child is lost in this area. Gain animal [b]Item 817[/b].

444.text: You’re not familiar with its anatomy, but the creature is clearly injured. It seems possible to heal the animal, but it might be just as relieved if you humanely take away its pain. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

445.text: The Traveler speaks in a contemplative tone. “As serene as this setting is, I think you’ll find true serenity at the horned rocks to the northwest of here.” Gain quest [b]Item 1676[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

446.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

447.text: From your elevated perch, you can see for miles around. To the north there’s a large globe floating in the water; to the east, several boats float on and hover above the water. Gain 2 boost and continue.

448.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Your sensitive nose also catches a whiff of the lotus on the shoreline, which smells like the lotion you used at the beach as a child. Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

449.text: Their eyes never leaving the water, the sentient explains that they are a lookout tasked with alerting those in the forest if the water sentients invade. They were selected because of their excellent vision, even among wood sentients. After giving you some tips about how to look out for danger, they send you on your way. Gain ability [b]Item 1477[/b] and 1 boost.

045.text: The sentient is in full control of the monstrosity, and they seem to be enjoying the ride. Within a few seconds they disappear down the tunnel to the right. It’s then that you notice another tunnel in front of you with a much smaller opening. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

450.text: As you observe your surroundings, you notice some large pods on the shore and a monster lurking underwater near the shoreline to the north. You may gain 1 boost or 1 skill of your choice; you may continue.

451.text: Inside the protective bubbles, the sentients are heavily armored. They’re here for an attack. They might be open to you joining them, or you can defend your fellow landwalkers against them by striking now. Gain 2 boost and continue.

452.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

453.text: Sparks fly as sentients pound metal around a fire. Their craftsmanship is on full display, including an impressively designed scythe. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1462[/b].

choices.option: Enter the building when the sentients aren’t looking
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; go to interior [b]Location 574[/b].

454.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

455.text: A gatekeeper is lounging near a turnstile and collecting fees from entrants. Gain 1 boost and choose one:

choices.outcome: Go northeast to [b]Location 762[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

choices.option: Inspect the treasure chest along the shore
choices.outcome: Roll 3 skill dice; you may add 1 extra die for each [fd8c46]engage[-], [fff349]take[-], or [ec1c3b]overpower[-] you pay. If you have at least 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 893[/b]. Instead, if you have at least one pair, gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

456.text: Several sentients—pirates, by the look of them—are removing their armor to take a break. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; go to interior [b]Location 576[/b].

457.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

458.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]. You may continue.

459.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

046.text: From the north you can hear the sounds of sentients shouting and struggling. As you touch the walls of the tunnel, you feel the vibrations of something massive moving to the south. Gain 2 boost and continue.

460.text: The shipwrights are busy enough with the main vessel that you could probably take off in one of the smaller boats tied to the dock. The workers seem like good company, though. Gain 1 boost and continue.

461.text: A tear in the wing of the large pink moth-like creature leaves it struggling to fly. You could attempt to bind the wing or relieve the animal of its suffering. Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

462.text: The sentient is preparing for a fight. The more you watch them, the more you’re convinced they’re going to attack the massive elemental to the north. Gain 1 boost and continue.

463.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

464.text: Several sentients are discussing maps near the front entrance. Gain 1 boost and continue.

465.action: [a84fc0]EXAMINE[-] the green glow in the grass
465.text: You notice an insect hop into the grass, then back out of it. A touch of the green goopy substance is stuck to its legs. Within seconds the insect collapses in the mud. Gain 1 boost and continue.

466.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for any sign of a trap
466.text: From a perch at the top of the nearby boulder, you see two bandits lying in wait on either side of the gap. You may pay [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] or 2 boost to catch the bandits off guard; if you do, gain item [b]Item 1209[/b] and go north to [b]Location 467[/b]. Otherwise, gain 2 boost and continue.

467.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. It’s also clearly armed and dangerous. Gain 2 boost and continue.

468.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past. There was a time when the crack in the ground—which grows into a wider gap and eventually a canyon to the west—wasn’t here at all, connecting the empires of gold and sand. As tectonic plates shifted, so did the union between those cultures. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

469.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

047.action: [a84fc0]LEARN[-] from the hunters from a safe distance
047.text: In an incredibly entertaining battle of wills, the sinew sentients eventually drag the beast to the ground. Gain ability [b]Item 1473[/b].

470.text: The beasts have long, powerful front legs that could deal real damage in a fight. A gentler approach may be more mutually beneficial. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

471.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

472.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

473.text: You find a narrow path through the jungle that leads into a city built into a series of trees. You’re standing closest to an art gallery; if you choose to enter, gain [fff349]1 take[-], go to city [b]Location 526[/b], and continue with the [fff349]take-[b]ACCESS[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 526[/b].

474.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

475.text: The small animal doesn’t present a threat, but its significantly larger caretaker in the background would pose an immediate problem if you did anything to its child. The hesitant approach seems to work, with the parent eventually nudging the child toward you before disappearing into the bushes. Gain animal [b]Item 831[/b].

476.text: Through a side window you see a forlorn sentient staring at the elemental to the west. As you walk past the palm trees, you notice the roots move—there could be danger afoot. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

477.text: The Traveler speaks in riddles. “There was a time when I would have given anything to visit a place like this, but what was once freedom has become my eternal prison. I’m glad you answered my call, but I fear I’ve trapped you here as well, and that cannot stand. You can send a rescue signal from my crashed ship to the northwest.” Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1598[/b] (place it in the center).

478.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

479.text: With your eyes barely above the surface of the water, you watch the sentient scan the surrounding area. They focus mostly on the area to the north and northwest where a large creature and a bright light can be seen from a distance. Gain 2 boost and continue.

048.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the beast as it exits the cavern
048.text: As the tip of the creature’s tail disappears down the tunnel, it flicks to the left, poking a hole through the sediment. A beam of light erupts through the tiny gap. Gain 1 boost; you may go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 040[/b].

480.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

481.text: To the east and the west you can see similar devices suspended in midair; the west is quiet, and there is a crowd of sentients perched on a rock to the east. Gain 1 boost and continue.

482.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

483.text: The beast appears to be deathly afraid of water. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

484.text: The structure seems to be a central hub for all towers, connecting them with a combination of ancient and modern technology. As you study it, one of the lights on the tower changes to a pink hue, and a head begins to emerge from it. Gain 2 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

485.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 1 boost and continue.

486.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

487.text: Your keen eyes notice that the ropes are sturdy enough to hold your weight if you balance very carefully. You could instead take the time to install a permanent bridge here: Gain 2 boost and continue.

488.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little sandy), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

489.text: The creatures are feeding on the smallest of scraps in the sand, yet they’re incredibly precise, even from a distance—their eyesight must be incredible. Sharing some special treats might net you a new companion. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

049.text: As you look around, you’re convinced that you’re inside a giant animal, not a cave. It must be asleep, though, as it’s not moving. Wedged onto a nearby spike is a beautiful ring covered in saliva, its blue gem glinting in the light of the cavern behind you. Gain item [b]Item 991[/b] and [2694d0]1 move[-].

490.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

491.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

492.text: Your keen eyes notice that a series of hovels are encased in snow. As you peer into one of them, your feet slipping in the melting snow, the occupant pops out and offers you safe passage down the hill for a mere $2. If you pay, go north to [b]Location 351[/b] and gain 1 morale for the sheer thrill of the ride. If you don’t pay, gain 1 boost and continue.

493.text: As the animal approaches, you feel a great burden lifted from your shoulders. Lose 1 curse or gain 1 morale; you may continue.

494.text: The chest is sturdy (but covered in ice), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

495.text: It’s really more of a rope than a bridge. Your keen eyes notice that the rope might be more effectively cut and used to lower yourself into the northern valley. Alternatively, you could spend some time repairing the bridge, which the sentients in the area might appreciate. Gain 2 boost and continue.

496.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

497.text: Aside from several unattended boats and remarkably pristine fishing waters, there’s an abundance of barrels just laying around the warehouse. Gain 2 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

498.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

499.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house through a window
499.text: You’re excited to see a fancy ring inside; gain 1 boost. Unless you’ve already determined whether the house is occupied, roll a challenge die. If the result is blank, no one is home. If the result is not blank, someone is home. You may continue.

050.text: After close examination, you determine that there is no option other than to leap, and you calculate the perfect angle for an attempt. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and continue.

500.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. You’re worried about the heat of the lava field, though. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]. You may continue.

501.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

502.text: The chest is sturdy (but warped from the heat), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

503.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

504.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

505.text: Clearly in a great mood, the sentient speaks freely of this area, most notably the trial to the south and the legendary island to the north. Gain quest [b]Item 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

506.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]. You may continue.

507.text: “Sometimes a magical island appears in the middle of this ocean. I don’t know why or when, but if you can find it, you will reach a new echelon of respect.” Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

508.text: The poachers appear to be wealthy tourists having fun at the great expense of the local fauna. They probably won’t stand up to minimal resistance. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

509.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

510.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] as far into the interior as you dare venture
510.text: You’re able to reach a bird-like creature without the sentient noticing your presence (gain animal [b]Item 816[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 476[/b].

511.text: Surveying the area, you can tell that several pieces of the mysterious cloak have torn off in the grove. You must identify at least 5 pieces—subtle differences between location [b]Location 104[/b] (which you cannot look at) and card [b]Location 511[/b]—before opening the trap door. Read entry [b]Location 511[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

512.text: You can feel a powerful force or presence on the island, and you resolve to face it. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

513.text: What looked at first like chains are actually electrical wires, with power surging from the sentient into them. The sentient isn’t straining against the bonds—rather, they’re leaning into them, charging the runes and the surrounding area. Gain 2 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

514.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this island was created as a pinnacle of hope and aspiration for sentients around the world. Gain 1 morale and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

515.text: The sky on the other side of the arch is a stark contrast to the sun-drenched horizon in this time. A scan reveals a significant time anomaly—you are now 100 years in the future compared to the other side of the gateway. Gain 1 boost and continue.

516.text: Just as the shipwright said, the tree is a prime candidate for crafting an ocean vessel. You just need to find the right approach to chop it down and bring it back to the past. Gain [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-] and continue.

517.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the ship back toward the time rift
517.text: The smelter shares that they have visited the past on a regular basis thanks to the nearby time rift, but they’re eager to go back to their own time after overseeing this century-long project. They lead you to the bridge and say their goodbyes. Your augsuit connects wirelessly to the ship’s AI, uploading a large amount of data into the ship’s navigational system. Gain vehicle [b]Item 1033[/b].

518.text: A sentient dances in the square, whipping up a frenzy of dust and sparks. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1469[/b].

choices.option: Garner interest in turning the solo dance into a street festival
choices.outcome: Gain quest [b]Item 1646[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

519.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a fishing supply store
519.text: Holding their nose to avoid the smell of old fish, an old sentient claims to have the finest fishing gear in all the land. Choose one:

choices.option: Pay $2 for a fancy fishing lure
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 913[/b].

choices.option: Improve the smell by scraping layers of fish off the rental equipment
choices.outcome: The store owner is grateful for your attention to detail. Gain $5.

520.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a bookstore
520.text: A bookstore is packed with reading material. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Look at page 30 in the Book of Vantages and gain 1 boost.
Gain either a book about the sentients of the world ([b]Item 1044[/b]) or a book of spells ([b]Item 1214[/b]).

choices.option: Translate a few pages of a book
choices.outcome: Learn about an uncharted island in the middle of the ocean to the northwest. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

521.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a hackerspace
521.text: The hackerspace reminds you of a place you used to frequent back home—the creative energy is palpable. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1472[/b].
Gain sentient [b]Item 1312[/b].

522.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a museum
522.text: A towering museum boasts one of the most impressive collections in the world. Inside you find a vast variety. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Metal sentients view themselves as the protectors of all tangible things, and they believe that the only way to uphold that responsibility is to steal and house those things in museums: Gain 2 boost.

choices.option: Study a collection of arcane tapestries
choices.outcome: Gain lesson [b]Item 1431[/b].

choices.option: Observe a rare animal that decides to accompany you
choices.outcome: Gain animal [b]Item 854[/b].

523.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a tavern
523.text: Sentients in the rowdy tavern are boasting of their recent exploits. Choose one:

choices.option: Listen to an extended story told by a young cave explorer
choices.outcome: Gain sentient [b]Item 1346[/b].

choices.option: Accept a dare to climb an infamous stone spire
choices.outcome: Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1677[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

524.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a casino
524.text: Enter a bustling casino filled with dice games. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn the rules to a dice game
choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1499[/b].

choices.option: Play a betting game called “Punch” with the sentients (minimum $1 required to play)
choices.outcome: Bet up to $3 on any skill type(s). Then roll 2 skill dice. For each die matching a skill on which you bet, gain double the amount you bet, then lose all coins you bet. You may play this game up to 3 times. Gain sentient [b]Item 1332[/b].

525.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a blacksmith
525.text: A portly blacksmith waves you over to their kiln and offers to teach you a quick lesson. Choose one:

choices.option: Learn how to wield the magic of repairs and fixes
choices.outcome: Gain spell [b]Item 1367[/b].

choices.option: Learn how to control fire with your mind
choices.outcome: Gain spell [b]Item 1383[/b].

526.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a flower arrangement class
526.text: The teacher leading the flower arrangement class invites you to join the session. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1465[/b].
Gain lesson [b]Item 1421[/b].

527.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy village toward a tour guide
527.text: You find a tour guide poring over a map. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 1262[/b]; the tour guide highlights your current location (view page 19 in the Book of Vantages; you are in region L).
View page 19 in the Book of Vantages.
With a wink, they speak of a mysterious, magical island to the south. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1686[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).
