528.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a school
528.text: The teacher at the school invites you to join the class for a few minutes. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain ability [b]Item 1460[/b].
Gain 2 morale.

529.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward the pyramid
529.text: In the grand pyramid, you witness an ancient gold sentient offer their husk to a youngling. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The husk is too big for the youngling, but a nearby sentient assures you that they’ll grow into it. Gain 2 morale and 1 boost.

choices.option: Interrupt the ceremony to ask questions
choices.outcome: Some of the sentients resent the interruption, but others appreciate your curiosity about their culture. Gain 2 boost.

530.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward a tavern
530.text: The tavern is full of patrons either washing away their sorrows or celebrating their good luck. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The sentient bemoans their adult offspring, who is deeply in debt. Gain quest [b]Item 1682[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

choices.option: Celebrate the wedding of a wealthy sentient
choices.outcome: Gain 2 morale and $3.

531.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] through the busy city toward an eyeglass shop
531.text: The owner of the eyeglass shop blinks at you behind a thick pair of goggles. Choose one or gain 1 boost:

choices.option: Pay $5 for a pair of night-vision goggles
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 945[/b].

choices.option: Pay $7 for a pair of mystery goggles
choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 986[/b].

541.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
541.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a bedroll. Gain item [b]Item 971[/b].

542.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
542.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a snare. Gain item [b]Item 947[/b].

543.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
543.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a barrel filled to the brim. Gain item [b]Item 1158[/b].

544.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
544.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a shovel. Gain item [b]Item 894[/b].

545.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
545.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a grappling claw. Gain item [b]Item 903[/b].

546.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
546.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a large egg on top of a column. Gain item [b]Item 979[/b].

547.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
547.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a trident. Gain item [b]Item 1089[/b].

548.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the ruins for a useful item
548.text: As you scour the ancient pillars, you find a magic wand. Gain item [b]Item 981[/b].

549.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the tent for the most useful item
549.text: You’re delighted to find a fishing lure inside the tent. Gain item [b]Item 913[/b] and exit to [b]Location 103[/b] before the occupants return.

550.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the tent for the most useful item
550.text: A good pair of pliers in the right pair of hands offer plenty of utility. Gain item [b]Item 882[/b] and exit to [b]Location 131[/b] before the occupant wakes up.

551.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the tent for the most useful item
551.text: The well-worn hiking boots would make your journey much more comfortable. Gain item [b]Item 955[/b] and exit to [b]Location 225[/b] before the occupants return.

552.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the tent for the most useful item
552.text: The climbing gear will make your exploits much easier. Gain item [b]Item 884[/b] and exit to [b]Location 294[/b] before the occupants return.

553.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
553.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the elixir. Gain item [b]Item 864[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 115[/b].

554.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
554.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the green crystal. Gain item [b]Item 1163[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 124[/b].

555.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
555.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the pliers. Gain item [b]Item 881[/b] and calmly exit through the western window to [b]Location 128[/b].

556.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
556.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the fish trap. Gain item [b]Item 912[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 204[/b].

557.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
557.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the metal key. Gain item [b]Item 918[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 215[/b].

558.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
558.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the tincture. Gain item [b]Item 867[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 266[/b].

559.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
559.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the water bag. Gain item [b]Item 857[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 408[/b].

560.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for an item that will help you see in dark places
560.text: Gain item [b]Item 1086[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 673[/b].

561.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the interior for the smallest item
561.text: Someone with lesser perception may have missed the knife on the table. Gain item [b]Item 1209[/b] and calmly exit to [b]Location 760[/b].

562.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
562.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pike; gain item [b]Item 1229[/b]. Calmly exit to [b]Location 160[/b].

563.text: As you advance into the room, you find a blue crystal; gain item [b]Item 1160[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a ninja outfit (gain item [b]Item 942[/b]). Either way, exit to [b]Location 200[/b].

564.text: The detail on the mask is incredible, and you’re compelled to put it on, but the security shield blocks you from touching it. You may pay 1 boost to disarm the shield; if you do, gain item [b]Item 1002[/b]. If you don’t, gain 1 boost. Either way, exit to [b]Location 216[/b].

565.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
565.text: As you advance into the room, you find a special key; gain item [b]Item 917[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a beautiful lantern (gain item [b]Item 953[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 239[/b].

566.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the tent for the farthest item
566.text: As you advance, you find some light armor; gain item [b]Item 973[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a pike (gain item [b]Item 1229[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 304[/b].

567.text: You sit down in the first row, quietly tucking the mask into your bag (gain item [b]Item 1039[/b]) as you wait for the other students to arrive. The lesson is short but informative; gain lesson [b]Item 1429[/b].

568.text: You notice that the goggles aren’t fully functional without their matching pair, which the owner admits is in the hands of a sentient heading to the western observatory. They offer full value for 1 card in your grid or reserve with a coin value (if you accept, lose the card and gain its coin value). They also try to sell you the pair of goggles; you may buy them for $3 (gain item [b]Item 941[/b]). Then exit to [b]Location 333[/b].

569.text: On top of the crate you find a pickaxe; gain item [b]Item 896[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you also find a winter coat tucked away inside the crate (gain item [b]Item 929[/b]). Nonchalantly exit to [b]Location 335[/b].

570.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
570.text: As you advance into the room, you find a vase; gain item [b]Item 863[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach an elegant robe (gain item [b]Item 966[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 338[/b].

571.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
571.text: You’re able to reach a large egg (gain item [b]Item 978[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 376[/b].

572.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
572.text: As you advance into the room, you find some blueprints; gain item [b]Item 1297[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a bypass code (gain item [b]Item 1178[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 396[/b].

573.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the house for the farthest item
573.text: As you advance into the room, you find a screwdriver; gain item [b]Item 876[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a huge hammer (gain item [b]Item 950[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 410[/b].

574.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
574.text: As you advance into the room, you find a battery pack; gain item [b]Item 874[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a scythe (gain item [b]Item 938[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 453[/b].

575.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
575.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of manacles; gain item [b]Item 944[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a set of pikes (gain item [b]Item 1229[/b]). Calmly exit either back outside ([b]Location 455[/b]) or into the city ([b]Location 762[/b]).

576.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
576.text: As you advance into the room, you find a grappling hook; gain item [b]Item 905[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach some light armor (gain item [b]Item 974[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 456[/b].

577.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
577.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of night-vision goggles; gain item [b]Item 945[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, also tuck a map into your back pocket (gain item [b]Item 1262[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 464[/b].

578.text: As you advance into the warehouse, you find a rope; gain item [b]Item 901[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to sneak a barrel from the cargo bay (gain item [b]Item 1158[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 497[/b].

579.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the house for the farthest item
579.text: As you advance into the room, you find a forcefield generator; gain item [b]Item 982[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a magma shovel (gain item [b]Item 900[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 499[/b].

580.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for an item of your choice
580.text: Gain your choice of either the purple crystal ([b]Item 1161[/b]), the ice skates ([b]Item 951[/b]), the time bomb ([b]Item 871[/b]), or the screwdriver ([b]Item 875[/b]). Then exit to [b]Location 613[/b].

581.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] through the interior for the rarest item
581.text: As you advance into the room, you find a seed; gain item [b]Item 1019[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, you’re also able to take some discarded credits (gain $8). Calmly exit to [b]Location 492[/b].

582.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
582.text: As you advance into the room, you find a trident; gain item [b]Item 1090[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a fish trap (gain item [b]Item 932[/b]). Calmly exit north to [b]Location 641[/b].

583.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the proceedings using the universal translation device
583.text: You were hoping for an amazing discussion about this planet, but today’s session is just a discussion about budgets. Your father would have enjoyed it, but you duck out after a few minutes. Gain item [b]Item 891[/b] and exit to [b]Location 777[/b].

584.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
584.text: As you advance into the room, you find a bow and arrow set; gain item [b]Item 956[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re able to reach a spring trap (gain item [b]Item 926[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 662[/b].

585.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
585.text: As you advance into the room, you find a book; gain item [b]Item 1044[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a winter coat (gain item [b]Item 929[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 676[/b].

586.text: Find card [b]Location 535[/b] (it’s a large card) and place it on the table. According to the fine script etched into the leather, you can unlock the item’s magic if you use the tools in the correct order. The goal is to select the tool to use fourth overall. See entry [b]Location 586[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

587.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
587.text: As you advance into the hut, you find a totem; gain item [b]Item 899[/b]. If you pay 1 boost, you also pocket some freshly caught fish (item [b]Item 1226[/b]) or fruit (item [b]Item 1224[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 744[/b].

588.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the house for the farthest item
588.text: As you advance into the room, you find a totem; gain item [b]Item 898[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a sword (gain item [b]Item 888[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 737[/b].

589.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the flowers at the foot of the statue
589.text: At the foot of the towering, humanoid statue, you find a large egg. Gain item [b]Item 977[/b] and exit to [b]Location 763[/b].

059.text: There is no tide and no wind, and it requires careful navigation to escape the doldrums. Gain ability [b]Item 1464[/b] and 1 morale, then roll a skill die and go to where the tides take you: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 062[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 053[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-] ([b]Location 431[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 453[/b]); [fff349]take[-] ([b]Location 367[/b]); [ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 426[/b]).

590.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for a precious item
590.text: As you advance into the room, you find a saddle; gain item [b]Item 958[/b]. If you pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a machete (gain item [b]Item 920[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 769[/b].

591.action: [a84fc0]INSPECT[-] the device floating outside the window
591.text: You realize that the device is actually a vehicle—some sort of flying carpet. You step onto it, and it gently lowers you to the ground. Gain vehicle [b]Item 985[/b] and exit to [b]Location 787[/b].

592.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] the labels on some of the nearby vials
592.text: As the sentient fills a vial with a sand-like substance, you find the shelves filled with similar bottles labeled things like, “First trip to the capital city,” “Scary incident while home alone—false alarm,” and “Architecture class final exam.” You shake a few flakes from the final vial onto your tongue, and they melt like grains of salt. Your mind is filled with blueprints. Gain item [b]Item 1295[/b].

593.text: You move deeper into the dungeon. Gain a random skill and move to the dungeon location matching that skill: [2694d0]move[-] ([b]Location 596[/b]); [a84fc0]look[-] ([b]Location 019[/b]); [0b955e]help[-] ([b]Location 599[/b]); [fd8c46]engage[-]/[fff349]take[-]/[ec1c3b]overpower[-] ([b]Location 594[/b]).

595.text: The book contains descriptions of spells and sorcery that you can barely comprehend. Gain item [b]Item 1215[/b].

597.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] deep into the interior for the farthest item
597.text: As you advance into the room, you find a pair of binoculars; gain item [b]Item 972[/b]. If you also pay 2 boost, you’re also able to reach a map (gain item [b]Item 1251[/b]). Calmly exit to [b]Location 305[/b].

600.text: The three professors in the Universal Academy greet you and invite you to choose your field of arcane study. Choose one:

choices.outcome: The leaf sentient welcomes you with open arms. Gain lesson [b]Item 1419[/b] and 1 health.
The energy sentient welcomes you with a joke. Gain lesson [b]Item 1424[/b] and 1 morale.
The sand sentient welcomes you with a word of advice. Gain lesson [b]Item 1429[/b] and 1 boost.

601.text: The odor is that of an icicle, somehow wet and frozen at the same time. You smile as holiday memories come to mind; you wish there were someone else nearby with whom you could share those stories. Gain 1 boost and continue.

602.text: The chest is sturdy (but frozen), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

603.text: The bird-like creature is interested in circuitry, and you can probably use its curiosity to your advantage. You also notice tracks in the snow leading east. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

604.text: Despite the gaping wound on their back, the sentient’s attention is entirely on the yellow crystal they’re holding. Gain 2 boost, and gain either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

605.text: Six sinew sentients huddle around the fire, roasting some vegetables on the open flame. They left their weapons to the side of the temporary shelter. Gain 2 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

606.text: The sentient nods, appreciating that you know your place. They suggest that you move west out of circuit territory, but a quick visit to the famed ice obelisk to the north first is worth the time. Gain 2 boost and continue.

607.text: From the way the largest animal plows a path for the others, you suspect they are a parent. Their thick, armor-like outer shell protects them from the cold and could probably insulate you too. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

608.text: At first you think it’s a charging station, but there’s something about the ports that indicates that this is for sentients, not machines or vehicles. In fact, you think it may be compatible with your augsuit. Gain 2 boost and continue.

609.text: The chest is sturdy (but frozen shut), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

061.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for an entrance to the nearby island
061.text: Upon arriving at a hidden cove, you realize that it’s part of a small archipelago. Gain ability [b]Item 1515[/b] and go to [b]Location 512[/b].

610.text: The beast is moving slowly but steadily to the southwest. It’s built for survival against all odds, but you have a hunch that you could mimic its behavior to be perceived as a friend. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

611.text: The obelisk isn’t cold to the touch, yet your sensors indicate that it is the same temperature as the ice below your feet. As you stare inside, it emits a piece of information into your brain. Gain spell [b]Item 1377[/b]; you may continue.

612.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

613.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

614.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] your surroundings while the ancient sentient communicates
614.text: You see a sentient busy at work to the north, a purple glow to the warmer east, a frozen lake to the south, and some buried technology to the west. The sentient seems a bit annoyed that you’re not paying more attention to their stories. Gain 1 boost; you may continue.

615.text: Aside from the loose cord on the ground that clearly connects to the runecaster, you notice something moving on top of the massive mountain to the west. To the east is a dangerous-looking gateway. Gain 2 boost and continue.

616.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

617.text: You find a way to connect your augsuit to the tall circuit board. Suddenly you’re flooded with information about cities of the world. Gain item [b]Item 1193[/b].

618.text: You recognize the words as a series of vocalized 1s and 0s, which your implant converts into words. The masks are asking what you are worthy of, and they’re growing impatient for you to respond. Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-] and continue.

619.text: The sentient is a smug but detail-oriented teacher, and they even offer a tentative compliment for the basic bauble you manage to craft. Gain item [b]Item 1098[/b].

620.text: Your eyes play tricks on you if you look directly at the sentient, so you focus on their surroundings instead. The box appears to be siphoning energy from the sentient and dispatching it outwards through the wires. The sentient does not seem to be a willing participant. Gain 2 boost, and gain [0b955e]1 help[-], [fff349]1 take[-], or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

621.action: [a84fc0]MEMORIZE[-] the maze (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
621.text: Find card [b]Item 1146[/b] and place it on the table. It shows the route through the maze, starting with a northeast path, followed by a west path. Now flip the card face down. When you’re ready, spend up to a minute memorizing the route. Then flip the maze so only the other players can see it and proceed to declare the full route using cardinal directions relative to the starting position. If you’re playing solo, write down the directions and then check your work. See entry [b]Location 621[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

622.text: The sentient is eager to educate a lesser being like yourself, and they teach you the basics of mind magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1429[/b].

623.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

624.text: You carefully maneuver close to the nearest column, where you find a treasure chest directly under the lights. Roll 3 skill dice; you may reroll each die once. If you have 3 of a kind, gain item [b]Item 996[/b]. Instead, if you have a pair, gain item [b]Item 1161[/b]. Otherwise, gain $4.

625.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to sentients discussing their experiences with the crystal
625.text: One of the sentients shares that they had not connected to the Lightstone in a while, and they felt like they were losing their sense of self. The other agreed, saying that the Lightstone is the difference between sentients like them and machines. They also speak of the prophecy of the Darkstone. Gain 2 boost and quest [b]Item 1663[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

626.text: Circuit sentients enter and exit the busy building, which seems to be a factory. You won’t blend in with them, so you’ll need to find another way inside. Gain 2 boost and continue.

627.text: Choose one target to focus on:

choices.outcome: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).
Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.
The clear liquid inside catches your eye. Gain item [b]Item 862[/b].

You find a short cable leading into a shop displaying rows of crystals. If you enter, gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-], go to city [b]Location 521[/b], and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 521[/b].

628.text: It isn’t difficult to see that someone was trying to repair the nearby crystal and its contraption. It’s one of many in the area—this must either be a farm for growing crystals or a farm for harvesting power from crystals. Gain 1 boost and continue.

629.text: One of the magnificent creature’s tentacles is wedged tightly into a gap in the cliff. There are signs of struggle, but at this point the animal has given up. It will prove difficult to help—perhaps relieving it from its misery will be more humane? Gain 1 boost and either [0b955e]1 help[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

630.text: “As long as I’ve known them, circuit sentients have been just as technologically advanced as they are afraid of physically disconnecting from their vast network. I believe this to be a good thing, as their untethered ambitions may have grave consequences for the galaxy.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

631.text: The bubbles seem to be coming from a creature much deeper in the ocean to the north. To reach it, you will need to navigate an underwater forest of increasingly large vegetation. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

632.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

633.text: Unlike most fish, this animal breathes air. It even uses its oxygen reserve to propel itself into the safety of the surrounding vegetation whenever a potential predator approaches. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

634.text: You find a functional pair of flippers still attached to a skeleton. Gain item [b]Item 927[/b] and continue.

635.text: “If you uproot a portion of this flora, you can brew it into a salve that will add some spring to your step.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

636.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

637.text: “There is something so calm about exploring this underwater world, though I say that as someone who doesn’t require oxygen. Please be prepared for the vastness of the ocean.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

638.text: You can’t see much other than the lotus in front of you and some remnants of a spaceship to the east. The lotus gives you a sense of peace. Gain 1 health; you may also lose 1 curse. You may continue.

639.text: It looks like the beast died from multiple bite wounds. There is a stillness in the water around the skeletons, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

640.text: A pair of heavily armed sentients monitor all creatures that pass through the corridor. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

641.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for a secondary entrance into the city
641.text: You swim in place above a group of small water sentients. If you follow them, gain [a84fc0]2 look[-], go to city [b]Location 528[/b], and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 528[/b].

642.text: The great beast isn’t threatening at all; rather, it seems to be a vessel for landwalking sentients to travel underwater. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

643.text: The underwater creatures seem to enjoy the challenge of swooping close to the waterspout and then darting away at the last minute. A few of them even cling to each other while doing so. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

644.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

645.action: [a84fc0]YIELD[-] to the sentient, explaining that you mean no harm
645.text: The sentient’s aggressive stance softens, and they lower their weapon-clad arm. They explain that they are the royal bodyguard for the ruler of these waters. Choose your response:

choices.outcome: The sentient nods and leads you north to [b]Location 646[/b].
The sentient punches your shoulder affectionately and leads you far north to [b]Location 647[/b]

646.action: [a84fc0]YIELD[-] to the creature, kneeling on the ocean floor
646.text: The sentient is pleased by the gesture, and they welcome you to participate in the Trial of Strength to the north. If you accept, go to [b]Location 647[/b]; you may continue to perform the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, gain 1 boost and continue.

647.action: [a84fc0]MEMORIZE[-] a pattern in front of the judges
647.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the water sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]FIGHT[/b][-] action.

648.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] north through the wildlife toward the shore
648.text: Avoiding contact with the plants, you rise above the sharks. Sensing your movement, several sharks dart after you. Roll 3 skill dice; if the results include at least [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-], go north to [b]Location 478[/b]. Otherwise, lose 1 health and either continue here or go to an adjacent listed location.

649.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for an entrance to the shipwreck
649.text: You find a large hole into what was the main cabin, and you begin to scour the wreckage for valuables. Go to interior [b]Location 012[/b].

650.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the sentient’s plea for aid
650.text: The water sentient explains that they are an outcast due to their disformity. While they are proud of what they’ve achieved and overcome, the gold growing on their back is making it increasingly difficult for them to complete even the easiest tasks. They beg you to journey east into the forest to find their landwalker friend who is developing a cure. Gain 1 boost, [a84fc0]1 look[-], and quest [b]Item 1655[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

651.text: The animal is close enough that you can count its teeth, meaning it’s either very angry or very hungry. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

652.text: The well-armed sentients patrol around the pits. You can hear the muffled cries of someone inside the nearest pit. Based on how they wield their weapons, it may be difficult to fight these guards. Roll 4 skill dice and gain skills matching 2 of the results. Continue.

653.text: It’s sturdy but waterlogged, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

654.text: Roll 1 skill die. If the result is [fd8c46]engage[-] or [ec1c3b]overpower[-], suffer 1 heat damage as the anemones sting you. Either way, go to [b]Location 479[/b].

655.text: You can’t see the source of the bubbles to the north, but the light they emit illuminates just how flat and sturdy the underwater shelf is. Near the shelf, you spot a pile of sunken debris that could be used for a structure or even a weapon. Gain 2 boost and continue.

656.text: As your keen-but-waterlogged eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 032[/b].

657.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

658.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler as they inspect their surroundings
658.text: “There are rumors of an impending land invasion by these water-bound sentients. These glass pods confirm my fears that sand sentients are supporting the water invasion.” Gain 2 boost and continue.

659.text: Coins glitter among the skeletons, as does a glowing box. In the distance, the gravekeeper tracks your every move as if waiting for an excuse to defend this territory. Gain 2 boost and continue.

660.text: The gregarious eel-like creature greets even the smallest fish that swims by. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

661.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

662.text: You gag at the sight of three large sentients peeling flesh from massive bones in the main entrance. The sentients see you but are unbothered. They toss you some meat but politely ask you to eat it later, explaining that they’re vegetarian. Gain item [b]Item 1217[/b] and 2 boost.

663.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this area was a place for wood and energy sentients to meet and play, including some that would emerge from a hidden cave to the west of here. As you study it, you can’t help but smell the nearby lotus. Gain 1 health and 1 boost; you may also lose 1 curse.

664.text: The surface of the gateway is covered with an opaque, nebulous substance that you can’t see beyond, so you slowly stick your head into it. On the other side, the green grass and blue skies are replaced by a massive cavern filled with a fiery light. You may either go to cave [b]Location 083[/b] or stay here and gain 1 boost.

665.text: Concealed by the long grass, you follow the owner of the houses as they check on their residents. They’re each a different type of sentient, but the landlord has some sort of translation device. One of the residents complains about their ceilings. The Traveler stays by your side while you snoop, astutely pointing out that this could be a great place to start a settlement if the locals condone it. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1600[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

666.text: The tree giggles as you poke and prod at them, though they don’t stop you. They’re grateful for your company, and they say that they would be happy to join you in your journey if you could bring them the Tools of Creation. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and quest [b]Item 1640[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

667.text: This culture’s customs may be foreign to you, but you gather that this is some kind of wedding ceremony involving a bridge as a literal rite of passage. It seems intentional that there are no witnesses, so you remain quiet. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

668.text: Given its posture, the animal is more curious than afraid. It doesn’t seem dangerous, though all the cockroaches you’ve ever encountered have been notorious thieves. Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

669.text: The mushroom has an earthy odor, and it clears out your sinuses. Gain 1 health and continue.

670.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

671.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the Traveler talk about your mission
671.text: “If you’re trying to assemble a group of sentients, you’ll find both leaf and wood sentients to the north and east of here.” Gain 1 boost and continue.

672.action: [a84fc0]LEARN[-] how to fish from the friendly but difficult to understand sentient
672.text: Their instructions are hard to follow, but you’re familiar with the general concept of fishing, so you figure it out. Gain ability [b]Item 1461[/b] and 1 health.

673.text: Peering through a window, you can see that no one is inside, just some tools and a number of shoes. Gain 1 boost; you may go to interior [b]Location 560[/b].

674.text: The creature methodically moves through the forest, plucking ripe fruit from the trees. It seems to know this path well, and all passing sentients revere it and smile when the animal gives them a piece of fruit. Gain 1 boost; you may continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]SHARE[/b][-] action at a cost reduced by 1.

675.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

676.text: The sentient says that the embassy rejected their request to deliver an antidote to their friend in the watery depths to the west. Choose one:

choices.outcome: Gain item [b]Item 865[/b] and quest [b]Item 1655[/b] (add the quest horizontally to your supply).
Gain sentient [b]Item 1350[/b].
Go to interior [b]Location 585[/b].

677.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] through a thicket for a back-alley entrance
677.text: A bowl of worms props open the door to a shop. If you enter, gain [a84fc0]2 look[-], go to city [b]Location 519[/b], and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 519[/b].

678.text: The sentient is definitely angry about something, as they keep muttering about “furry beasts.” An animal saunters behind them, chewing on the shorter grass. As perturbed as the sentient appears, you have the feeling that you could talk to them or enlist their aid. Gain ability [b]Item 1483[/b] and 1 boost; you may continue.

679.text: Keeping a safe distance from the fungal animal, you look over the orb. The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

680.text: The creature proceeds to walk around the grove. You notice that the animal leaves a path of healthy grass and flowers in its wake. Gain 2 boost and continue.

681.action: [a84fc0]SCAN[-] the area, looking for the most viable path forward
681.text: The leftmost path looks too easy to be true, so you scan for a trap… and sure enough, there’s a mammoth spider lurking above it. But you also don’t want to get caught in the web—you would really need to squeeze through there to proceed north. Gain 2 boost and continue.

682.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house through a window
682.text: You’re excited to see a variety of treasures inside the house, including a ring, a set of tools, and a key. Unfortunately several sentients also occupy the building. Gain 1 boost and continue.

683.text: You soon find that the sentient is prone to rambling about their acts of service and generosity, but you manage to steer the conversation toward something useful. Gain lesson [b]Item 1420[/b].

684.text: You sit down on the stairs, breathing meditatively as the creatures swarm around you. One by one they land next to you. They don’t look at you, though—they are focused on one of the trees at the base of the staircase. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

685.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

686.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

687.action: [a84fc0]SCAN[-] the horizon by stretching into the treetops
687.text: View page 43 of the Book of Vantages and gain 2 boost.

688.text: The tower has a number of good footholds and handholds; you could get a great view of the surrounding area if you scaled it or use the tower’s transmission capabilities to contact your homeworld. As you study it, movement on a nearby tree trunk catches your eye. Something orange and furry springs out of sight to the east. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

689.text: Midway up the tree, you wait patiently for the cats to remember you. Slowly they slide down the branches, claws scraping the bark. Gain animal [b]Item 827[/b].

690.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] ancient text on the ancient gateways
690.text: Four of the five gateways have similar text, each describing a specific destination somewhere else in the world. Unfortunately, none of the gateways are currently functional. Gain 2 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

691.action: [a84fc0]PREPARE[-] to extract a glowing object from the roots
691.text: You perceptively notice that five warriors lurk among the roots, each poised to strike anyone who steps foot inside. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

692.text: The animal’s shadow blocks the sun as it looms over you. Its head lowers to meet you eye to eye, and it sees that you mean no harm. Gain animal [b]Item 841[/b].

693.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the wood sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Gain [2694d0]2 move[-] and continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SCALE[/b][-] action.

694.text: The glint of a machete hanging in the ruins catches your eye, as does the treasure chest between you and the ruins. A closer examination reveals that the chest is extremely well built, and the only way to open it is with a key. Choose one:

choices.option: If you have item [b]Item 916[/b] or [b]Item 996[/b] (both are keys)
choices.outcome: Open the chest to gain item [b]Item 1018[/b].

choices.option: If you don’t have item [b]Item 916[/b] or [b]Item 996[/b]
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and [fff349]1 take[-]; go to interior [b]Location 546[/b].

695.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to a sentient who emerges from the farmhouse
695.text: The farmer, out of breath from panic, explains that their entire herd broke free last night. They beg you to search the surrounding area to find them and steer them back here. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and quest [b]Item 1702[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

696.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

697.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

698.text: Avoiding a tangle of vines and tree limbs, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 038[/b].

699.text: A path is broken by the gully, as if a recent earthquake caused the divide. This place appears well-traveled despite the gap—it could be a good place to pick a few pockets or build something useful. The levitating device on the left is out of reach from this side of the gap. Gain 2 boost and continue.

700.text: It looks like the beast was a massive dragon. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

701.action: [a84fc0]STUDY[-] the inner workings of the box
701.text: The box is a combination of technology and sorcery. You have a very bad feeling about entering it. Gain lesson [b]Item 1430[/b] and 1 boost.

702.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

703.text: The sentient relaxes into a less aggressive stance. Gain 1 boost and 1 skill of your choice; you may continue.

704.text: The orb is made of a shimmering, glass-like substance, and there are markings on the outside with which you might be able to interact. You don’t see how to access the interior, but there must be a way inside. Gain 1 boost and gain either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

705.text: Despite its imposing appearance, the creature seems to want to play. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

706.text: The behemoth has an incredible ability to fly, but it seems hurt or scared, and you quickly see why—a pod of similar creatures fly in pursuit not far away. Gain 1 boost and either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

707.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

708.text: The sentient rushes to explain that their child is stuck in a dangerous position to the north. Misinterpreting your hesitation for negotiation, they toss you some coins and beg you to help. Gain $4 and [2694d0]1 move[-]; go north to [b]Location 709[/b].

709.text: You hear the sound of whimpering from above. Choose one: gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

710.text: There’s a steep descent to the valley below, but you could potentially build or even excavate a more accessible option for traveling north. Alternatively, you could just find an easier path to the west. Gain 2 boost and continue.

711.text: The ancient creature is utterly exhausted from years of guarding the building. The Traveler informs you that stoneskin lizards can live to be nearly twice as old as this one is, so there is hope for this beast to be reinvigorated. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

712.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

713.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. Gain 1 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

714.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the sentient as they manipulate other clouds
714.text: There is a pattern to the sentient’s cloudcrafting, and the result is a form of communication, a call for help. They are searching for someone important to them, someone who has been taken from them. Gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-] and quest [b]Item 1652[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

715.text: You’re not the first person who has inquired about this process, though it isn’t much of one. The Soulkeeper examines you carefully, then selects a soulstone for you: Roll a skill die and gain a crystal matching the resulting color ([2694d0]blue[-]: [b]Item 1160[/b]; [a84fc0]purple[-]: [b]Item 1161[/b]; [fd8c46]orange[-]: [b]Item 1162[/b]; [0b955e]green[-]: [b]Item 1163[/b]; [fff349]yellow[-]: [b]Item 1164[/b]; [ec1c3b]red[-]: [b]Item 1165[/b]).

716.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 024[/b].

717.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

718.text: The sentient skids to a halt at the edge of the cliff, realizing they may have scared you. “I mean no harm,” they yell in a garbled voice. “I need help!” Gain 1 boost and continue.

719.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for an entrance to the hostel
719.text: Tucked away from the howling wind is a small door. Go to interior [b]Location 013[/b].

720.text: It looks like the beast died from the impact of a long fall. There is a stillness to the air around the skeleton, and you can’t decide whether to use the bones to your advantage or delve underneath. Gain 2 boost and continue.

721.action: [a84fc0]CALCULATE[-] the paths of the boulders (only if you have been welcomed as a participant in this trial; otherwise choose another action)
721.text: You must choose a single place to stand while boulders are rolled down the surrounding hills. Find card [b]Location 534[/b] (it’s a large card), place it on the table, and begin. Each of the arrows represents a single boulder teetering at the peaks of the valley. When the trial begins, each boulder will simultaneously tumble in a straight line—the direction indicated by its arrow—one hex at a time until it either exits the other side of the valley or it disintegrates by smashing into another boulder. There exists exactly 1 hex in the valley that will be safe for the duration of the trial (it will never be hit by a boulder). You may use tokens to simulate the tumbling boulders until you are ready to choose the hex where you will stand for the trial. See entry [b]Location 721[/b] in the Book of Secrets for the solution.

722.text: Each player—including you—on a location with any rune (a skill icon within their vantage) gains 1 boost. Then you roll X skill dice and gain all results matching the rune on this location. Also gain quest [b]Item 1706[/b] if a player doesn’t already have it (add it horizontally to your supply and place the first token on it).

723.text: You feel a surge of wisdom as you study the stone and the rune etched into it. For a brief moment you see a vision from the distant past—this is an ancient meeting place between metal and stone sentients. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill.

724.text: The chest is sturdy (but a little weatherworn), with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. As you examine it, you have the eerie sense that you too are being examined. Gain 2 boost and continue.

725.text: The sign reads that this is the start of the 9-Station Path. Gain 1 boost, [2694d0]1 move[-], and quest [b]Item 1673[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

726.text: The looming sentient grumbles that the travelers are trespassing on private property, and that they aren’t the first—many pilgrims venture this way. You relate to their frustration and ask if they would be willing to show you around their home as a guest, not as a pilgrim. The sentient descends to the ground and guides you to the east, allowing the smaller sentients to hurry away to the north. Go to [b]Location 410[/b], where the house becomes occupied upon your arrival.

727.text: Off to the side, different types of climbing gear are featured by an open-air vendor. If you enter, gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-], go to city [b]Location 523[/b], and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TRADE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 523[/b].

728.text: The sentient explains that they’re training for a “leap of faith” to the west to honor their lost pet, a hovertail that recently flew off to the east. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1650[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

729.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

730.text: As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 020[/b].

731.text: You find a tight gap in the wreckage that you might be able to squeeze through. It’s surprising that, despite the plummet from outer space, this part of the ship seems operational. You notice that there’s even more wreckage to the north of here, but it isn’t from your ship. Gain 2 boost and destiny [b]Item 1605[/b] (place it in the center); you may continue.

732.text: The spaceship has been here for a long, long time, and the remaining framework is quite frail. Go to interior [b]Location 791[/b].

733.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for a path to the Pearl
733.text: You find a narrow staircase carved into the back of the boulder, and you ascend the steps to touch the Pearl. When you do, your mind goes blank, save for three glowing symbols. Choose one and gain the corresponding spell:

choices.outcome: Gain spell [b]Item 1236[/b].
Gain spell [b]Item 1237[/b].
Gain spell [b]Item 1238[/b].

734.text: You look through the rift to see that it is a rift in time, not space—it’s the same place, just in the distant past or future when water covers this area of the world. Choose one:

choices.outcome: As your hand brushes against the edge of the rift, a jolt of awareness surges through you. Gain lesson [b]Item 1433[/b] and 1 boost.

choices.option: Interact with the area in a different way
choices.outcome: Gain 1 boost and continue.

735.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the sentient as they work
735.text: The sentient is inside a solid glass orb that alternates between opaque and transparent. The sentient seems frustrated. Gain 2 boost and continue.

736.text: It’s almost immediately clear that you will hurt yourself if you try to move north. You could instead walk east to chat with the giant sand sentient there or west to the shoreline. Gain 2 boost and continue.

737.action: [a84fc0]SPY[-] on the house from a distance
737.text: You’re excited to see a beautiful sword hanging from a pole inside; gain 1 boost.

738.text: As you wade toward the city, you follow the shoreline to an open-air tiki bar. If you enter, gain [fd8c46]1 engage[-], go to city [b]Location 527[/b], and continue with the [fd8c46]engage-[b]TALK[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 527[/b].

739.action: [a84fc0]PREPARE[-] to extract contraband from the island
739.text: You perceptively notice that there are three lookouts posted around the island. Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

740.text: The sentient is shouting about an important tree that was growing here—it seems to have disappeared overnight, and it will take 100 years to grow another. They speak of the rarity of the tree’s seeds and that they are found in a cave to the southeast. You also catch something about a “time portal.” Gain ability [b]Item 1494[/b], 1 boost, and [2694d0]1 move[-].

741.text: The sunset shining through the arch isn’t in the background—at least not in this time. A scan reveals a significant time anomaly around the arch. It’s the same place, but 100 years in the future. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

742.text: The sentient is a willing teacher, and they show you how to manipulate strands of time as you would a ball of yarn. Gain lesson [b]Item 1433[/b] and continue.

743.text: In a garbled voice that sounds like you’re underwater, the tall sentient says that they’re looking for help to solve a murder in the area. Gain [0b955e]1 help[-] and quest [b]Item 1645[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

744.text: Your attention is drawn to a large, threatening creature to the east. The sentients on the shoreline aren’t helping the situation— they’re heckling the beast. You notice some fishing supplies in the sand behind them. Gain 2 boost and continue.

745.text: The owner of the boat is probably in one of the buildings, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and continue.

746.text: The cove is rife with possibilities: You could start a business here, raid a home, or simply relax in the water. Choose one: gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

747.text: The tiny animal could not have chosen a worse location to avoid predators: It’s a vast expanse empty aside from the oddly shaped bush on your left. You have a hunch that if the animal were to join you willingly, the big-eared creature could be an effective thief. Gain 2 boost, and gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

748.text: You find a door leading into a shop filled with goggles and eyeglasses. If you enter, gain [a84fc0]2 look[-], go to city [b]Location 531[/b], and continue with the [a84fc0]look-[b]NAVIGATE[/b][-] action there. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 531[/b].

749.text: The lotus smells a bit like coconut. Gain 1 health from the purifying pollen; you may also lose 1 curse.

750.text: You stand your ground, making it clear to the kraken that you condemn its attacks just as you condemn any antagonism by the residents of the seaside village. The beast calms down and heads back to the depths. The villagers give you a generous offering in appreciation for your courage. Gain item [b]Item 899[/b], 1 morale, and [a84fc0]1 look[-].

751.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the child talk to their pet
751.text: The child is telling the animal all the things they hope to do, including a face-off with the elemental to the north, a race against a sand centipede, and dinner with their parents for the first time in months. Gain 1 boost, 1 random skill, and quest [b]Item 1643[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

752.text: Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Then continue with either the [0b955e]help-[b]RELEASE[/b][-] action or the [ec1c3b]overpower-[b]SLAY[/b][-] action.

753.text: The sentients’ diction is easy to understand. Several sentients discuss a race up ahead, which they’re hoping will keep the sand sentients distracted while they join an invasion to the northeast. Gain 1 boost and quest [b]Item 1694[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). You may continue.

754.text: Your impressive feat of memory impresses the sand sentients, who welcome you to participate in the trial. Continue with the [2694d0]move-[b]SPEED[/b][-] action.

755.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the sentient share their woes
755.text: “I spent years building a magnificent ship, and the first time I sailed through these waters from the northwest, a kraken dashed it against the rocks. I’m ruined!” You know that sometimes the best way to support someone in pain is simply to sit with them. So you do. Gain ability [b]Item 1494[/b], 1 morale, and 1 boost.

756.text: The chest is sturdy (but quite weather-worn), with a rusted lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

757.text: Sure enough, there is a cave behind one of the waterfalls. As your keen eyes adjust to the darkness, you reach a barrier that requires further attention. Go to cave [b]Location 023[/b].

758.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the animal from a safe distance
758.text: Judging by the size of the bone stuck in its throat, it may be best to steer clear of this creature. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

759.text: The sentient with the yellow shawl finds you to be a more receptive student, as you quickly pick up the basics of time magic. Gain lesson [b]Item 1433[/b].

076.text: Roll 3 skill dice. Gain 1 morale for each help result, then gain 1 health. As you listen, you notice another sound—there are people talking inside the building, one level up. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-] and continue.

760.text: Chaos engulfs the castle. The invaders are desperate to breach the walls and may accept your help, and the defenders seem helplessly trapped and might be persuaded to hire your services. With the castle’s guards likely distracted, you could sneak inside the castle from the cliffside. Gain 2 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

761.text: Your keen eyes notice a rope that you could climb as well as a small gateway guarded by a single sentry. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

762.text: The sentient has just come from Founder’s Temple to the near north. They are frantic with worry—an important egg was mistakenly offered to the Founder, and they need you to raid the temple to retrieve it. They suggest that you bring an item to offer to the temple, and they give you a small vial of energy as an option for the donation. Gain item [b]Item 1211[/b] and quest [b]Item 1637[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply).

763.text: It appears that the sentients who are granted entry are those carrying tangible offerings. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

764.text: As much fun as the sentients are having, you’re more comfortable watching. There are a few tipsy sentients who could use your help and a belligerent drunk who should be subdued. You can also hear the sounds of dockside workers to the east. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

765.action: [a84fc0]MEMORIZE[-] a map near the departure area
765.text: The map highlights the cities and towns of the world. Gain item [b]Item 1251[/b] and continue.

766.text: You don’t have much time to act, so you quickly survey your options. You can leap for the balloon and have a slim chance of catching it, or you could persuade, coerce, or even force the sentient to act in your favor. Gain 1 boost and either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

767.text: The city wall stretches as far as you can see in either direction, and while there may be weak points in it, the gate in front of you appears to be the easiest way to enter. The city is bustling with activity—you wonder whether you can buy a map from any of the vendors at the entrance, though you’ll need to move closer to find out. Gain 1 boost and continue.

768.text: The vendor on the left is selling maps and refreshments, while the sentient on the right looks a little lost. The smell of stables and animals wafts from inside the city, while some smoke drifts from the industrial district to the east. Gain 2 boost and continue.

769.text: Each sentient who approaches the building from the side has an animal, while those entering the front hand coins to the bouncer. Gain 2 boost, and gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

077.text: The sentients are so engrossed in their game that they still don’t notice your presence. Both are armed. You can feel air flowing from another level above, but due to the wind chimes, there’s no way to get up there without alerting the sentients. Gain 2 boost and continue.

770.text: The owner of the boat is talking to the owner of the port nearby, so you could either catch their attention or try to slip away in the boat before they notice. Gain 1 boost and continue.

771.action: [a84fc0]NAVIGATE[-] the ship away from the city
771.text: Fair winds sail you to your choice of a quiet cove to the northwest ([b]Location 490[/b]), the prairie to the northeast ([b]Location 347[/b]), or to the western outskirts of the city ([b]Location 459[/b]). From there you must leave the ship behind.

772.text: At first glance it looks like the sentient is bullying the ship, but from their posture and demeanor, you start to think that they might be patrolling these waters in an official capacity. You could seek to defuse the conflict, aid the ship, use the opportunity to commandeer the vessel, or even fight the sentient. Gain 1 boost and 1 random skill; you may continue.

773.text: The solid but uneven stone of the wall offers an opportunity for a skilled climber. The small gateway is a tempting way to pass north, but you would most likely get stuck inside unless you first dug your way in. There are also a few sentients on the wall to whom you could appeal for help. Gain [2694d0]1 move[-], [fd8c46]1 engage[-], or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

774.text: The sentient already has several apprentices, but they agree to show you some basic blacksmithing techniques on an old practice machete, which they let you keep. Gain item [b]Item 920[/b].

775.text: The sentient remains in the middle of the path—maybe it’s your imagination, but you’re pretty sure they flex as they intentionally bump against you. Your carefully organized possessions go flying in all directions. Gain 1 boost; you may rearrange your card grid.

776.text: In addition to a variety of robes and outfits, the vendor also has a package awaiting delivery. Gain 1 boost. When they notice you looking at the package, there is a glint in their eyes as they ask if you are a courier. If you say yes, gain item [b]Item 1034[/b] and quest [b]Item 1638[/b] (add it horizontally to your supply). Otherwise, continue.

777.text: Clear signage in several languages seems to indicate that the council here includes representatives from 12 different cultures. People attend the council meetings either as members of the audience (the sentry should be able to tell you more about attending) or as a speaker (which requires a formal offer of assistance). Gain either [fd8c46]1 engage[-] or [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

778.text: The fruit on the ground is soft and overripe. In the tree, the freshest fruit appears to be high up in the branches. Gain 2 boost and continue.

779.text: For each other player, gain 1 skill matching their character’s leftmost challenge die slot. If you are the only player, gain any 1 skill instead. You may continue.

078.text: The lonely sentient is eager to share the mechanics of wind harvesting. Lotuses release a substance into the air, and it can be harvested and processed by devices like this one. The resulting substance is powerful but addictive. The sentient begs you to help them escape. Gain [0b955e]2 help[-] and continue.

780.text: You find a bar of soap neatly wrapped in wax paper. Perhaps someone has covertly been bathing in the fresh water nearby. Gain item [b]Item 1207[/b].

781.text: From what you can gather, the sentient on the right stole a precious object crafted by the sentient on the left, though they claim theft was a valid transfer of ownership in their culture. Gain 1 boost and continue.

782.text: Just as your eyes can see that a purple sentient is lurking nearby, your nose picks up the scent of fear from the green sentient. They need your help. Gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]; you may continue.

783.text: The sentient works at the central bank, which they identify by gesturing to the golden-domed building in the rear. They mention offhandedly that the bank’s cavernous vaults store a considerable amount of treasure. Gain 1 boost and [a84fc0]1 look[-]; you may continue.

784.text: You identify a barrel among the rubble. Gain 1 boost and [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; go to interior [b]Location 548[/b].

785.action: [a84fc0]LISTEN[-] to the sentients on the bridge
785.text: You hear the voices of guards, the conversation alternating between gathering tolls from incoming travelers and concerns about the need for a more robust night shift due to the increase in bandits crossing the bridge in the evening. Gain 2 boost and continue.

786.text: Several cables stretch from the wall up to the palace; it would be quite a challenge to scale them, but the view is probably spectacular. Perhaps the three guards are susceptible to the powers of persuasion? Gain [fd8c46]2 engage[-] and continue.

787.text: The sentient keeps repeating that they “need to get to the museum.” You could follow them (gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]) or stay here to clear your head (gain 1 boost and [0b955e]1 help[-]) Either way, you may continue.

788.text: The metal sentient is planning to steal from the vendors in this pavilion, and they brag that you’ll learn a thing or two if you watch them do what they do best. Gain ability [b]Item 1482[/b]; you may continue.

789.text: The sentient is proud to showcase the various weapons they have for sale and to share the stories of how they stole them. It seems that theft is considered a form of art for metal sentients, though given the close proximity of this vendor, you’re better off trading with them or seeing if you could do them a favor. Gain 2 boost and continue.

079.action: [a84fc0]FOCUS[-] on the ancient markings on the pillar
079.text: The tiny runes that form the leyline seem to lift off the pillar and float into your mind. Gain spell [b]Item 1368[/b].

790.action: [a84fc0]TRANSLATE[-] a few pages of the book
790.text: The book describes the various elementals of the world. It’s currently open to a page about a metal elemental, which you can see over the city wall to the east. Look at page 24 of the Book of Vantages, then gain 1 boost and continue.

791.text: You find a number of oddities throughout the ship, including 12 compartments labeled in your language with the name of 12 elements, a barely functional radio, and, most curiously, a young girl in a cryogenic sleep. The readings on the chamber indicate that she’s been there for centuries and that waking her would almost certainly kill her. As you observe her, the Traveler’s holographic visage appears at your side and gestures toward the chamber. “I love this world, but I miss my home. You are my only hope.” Gain 2 boost and continue with the [0b955e]help-[b]RESCUE[/b][-] action.

795.text: You perceptively notice a guard lurking in the shadows to the right. You could avoid detection by moving no farther than the amulet hanging above the guard’s hiding place, or you could attack the guard before they attack you. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

799.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] the dark pit for anything of use
799.text: You’re elated to find a grappling hook wedged into the wall on the left. Gain item [b]Item 905[/b] and continue.

080.text: The sentient looks like they could use some help, but they’re also so occupied with their task that they should be easy to sneak around. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

801.text: You soak in the view from the sky island hovering above a vast sea before studying the shard for any sign of danger. There are no traps or surprises, and the shard is yours. Gain item [b]Item 1707[/b].

081.text: Beyond the servers, in the back of the cavern, the sediment is so thin that you can see movement on the far side. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

082.text: You kneel at the edge of the stream, positioning your ear just over the ice to determine its structural integrity. To your surprise, carrying through the frozen water are the voices of several sentients yelling at each other. Gain either [2694d0]1 move[-] or [fff349]1 take[-]; you may continue.

083.text: You toss a stone through the arch, and while you can’t find it in the back of the cavern, you do discover a partially blocked passage that may lead deeper into the planet. Gain 1 boost and continue.

084.action: [a84fc0]SEARCH[-] for a path that leads to the yellow crystal
084.text: A blind corner to your right leads to a path that extends around the cavern to a staircase descending directly to the crystal. It’s far too large for you to carry, but a generous piece breaks off into your hand. Gain item [b]Item 1164[/b] and 1 random skill. You may continue with a [2694d0]move[-] action on this location.

085.text: You could compete, but it might be easier just to bet on a few fighters instead. Either way, if you’re short on coins, you may need to steal from some nearby spectators. Gain 1 boost, and gain either [fff349]1 take[-] or [ec1c3b]1 overpower[-]; you may continue.

086.text: The lava is both a barrier and an abundant resource for you to use as you wish. As your eyes adjust to the bright light, you also see a faint glow in the back of the cavern that could lead even deeper into the planet. Gain 2 boost and continue.

087.text: There’s a lot to absorb in the busy cavern. The guards are distracted, so you could sneak around them to the back of the cave. You could also talk to the miners about what they’re doing or even rescue one of them, as some are chained to their posts. Gain 1 boost and [fd8c46]1 engage[-]; you may continue.

088.text: Amidst the endless tangle of roots and crystals is the beginning of a tunnel that is abruptly cut off by glowing sediment: something beyond, something deeper. Based on footprints in the moss, you suspect that there’s even more activity to the north. Gain 2 boost and continue.

089.text: Vibrant green crystals light the soft soil of the cavern; upon closer examination, you see tiny fruits growing around them. Gain item [b]Item 1224[/b] and continue.

090.text: Hidden among the coins and jewelry is a glimmer of something special: A glowing, ethereal key. Gain item [b]Item 917[/b] and 1 morale.

091.text: It’s sturdy, with a solid lock and ornate gold trim. Gain 2 boost and continue.

092.action: [a84fc0]EXAMINE[-] the porous exterior of the cavern
092.text: As you look closely at the gaping holes, you realize that the water abruptly ends in some kind of underwater oxygen bubble, perhaps due to a pressure anomaly. Beyond the cavern you see row upon row of giant, jagged teeth. Gain 1 boost and [2694d0]1 move[-]; you may continue.

093.text: Choose one of the three paths (from left to right: blue, orange, or green):

choices.outcome: After following a winding path, you reach a dead end. Etched into the wall are some clues for completing the maze. Gain 1 boost; you may pay 1 morale to try again.

This route ends abruptly, so abruptly that you almost miss the sentient sitting on the ground. They’re mumbling to themselves and drawing lines in the air. You console them until they calm down, at which point they share what they know about the maze. Gain ability [b]Item 1464[/b]; you may pay 1 morale to try again.
An endless series of twists and turns leads you to the end of the maze. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 043[/b].

094.text: A door on the western side of the underground city is ajar. You catch a glimpse of an array of computer screens inside. If you enter, go to interior [b]Location 042[/b]. Otherwise, go to city [b]Location 041[/b] and gain 1 random skill.

095.text: Each contains a tiny, 8-legged animal. Out of the corner of your eye you see a large creature staring at you. Gain 1 boost and continue.

096.action: [a84fc0]OBSERVE[-] the dragon while it prepares for another strike
096.text: From the copious amounts of drool dripping from the dragon’s jaw, you gather that it’s hungry. You also notice how thin the air is in this cavern—perhaps the dragon doesn’t need oxygen the way you do? Choose one: Gain 1 random skill and 1 skill of your choice, refresh all challenge dice from a row of your grid, or gain 1 boost on each card in a column of your grid. Continue.

097.text: Up close, you can see that these devices are ancient—it’s quite possible they’re the original runecasters, first of their kind, enclosed in this cavern so that their radioactive decay doesn’t destroy the world. As compelled as you are to feel the sheer power of activating them, you know the smart move is to turn around or exit through the door in the rear. Gain 2 boost and continue.

098.text: You find a method to the madness of the underground pathways, and soon you find yourself facing a glowing door that leads deeper into the planet. Go deeper into the planet to cave [b]Location 044[/b].

099.text: Something clicks as you study the glyphs, which seem to depict the evolution of the planet from nothing to a thriving world. An asteroid couldn’t have brought so many different elements through the vacuum of space. But a spaceship from an already evolved world could have seeded this planet with the origins of life. Gain 2 boost.
